title: Video Editor for Paid Ads (TikTok, Instagram, Facebook)
description:
Remote | Full-time or Part time | Fluent English Required



Time: 8-5pm EST (Hours are flexible since it is night shift but expected to be online at least till 3pm on most days, we care about performance not clocks).



Full time Salary based on Experience: Starting USD $700 - $1700 or ?39,000 – ?95,000 PHP/month



or Hourly: ?210/hour - ?500/hour 







About Topfoxx



TopFoxx is a woman-owned sunglasses brand designed in NYC. We don't make glasses that just look good we make glasses that solve problems. Our tangle-free aviators, floating sunglasses, foldable shades, UV400 lenses, and shatter-resistant designs are built for real people. We're a small, remote team, which means we move fast and every person we bring on has a real impact. 







We are growing. That growth is driven by performance creative ads that convert, content that earns attention, and a team that understands the difference between looking good and actually selling.







What this role actually is:



This is not a traditional video editing role. This is a performance creative position where video editing is the primary skill  but the job is to drive conversions, not just produce content. If your mindset is purely aesthetic, this is not the right fit. If you think in hooks, value props, and buyer psychology while you edit, keep reading.







The last person in this role grew it from video editor into Creative Media Manager collaborating across paid media, organic social, creative, marketing, and influencer teams. We're not expecting you to start there, but we do expect the ceiling to be high. Therefore we are hiring a Paid Media Video Editor who can bring bold ideas to life that convert, drive revenue through design, and elevate our brand visually across every touchpoint. This role blends strategic paid media, marketing performance, video editing, creative direction, and leadership. As the Paid Media Video Editor whose primary focus is creating ads that convert you will take raw footage (UGC, product clips, internal shoots) and turn it into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven video ads for
, Instagram, and TikTok. We don’t need cinematic edits, we need clear, smart, persuasive short form videos that make people click “Buy.” You will work underneth the marketing manager.







This is a hands-on, high-ownership role for someone who moves fast, understands selling through short video form, and thrives in a small business/startup environment where creative output directly impacts revenue.







If you’re someone who wants to make money with your creativity, execute fast, think like a marketer, and lead a creative vision, this is your role.







Here is the exact type of videos looking for you to make:











Your primary mission:



Turn offers, products, and real customer stories into video ads that make people click 'Buy.' Every edit you make serves one goal: revenue.







Your main platform is Meta 
 + Instagram) and TikTok. You will support organic social content as needed but paid ads are the core focus.







What You’ll DoPaid Ad Content (Primary Focus)



• Create vertical video ads for TikTok, Instagram, Meta &



• Develop multiple hook variations, angles, and pacing structures



• Edit videos using a clear problem ? solution ? outcome framework



• Optimize for CTR, thumb-stop rate, retention, and conversion intent



• Build high-performing UGC-style and influencer-style ads



• Repurpose and remix clips into new testable variations



• Select the most compelling 10–15 seconds from longer footage



• Apply strong, readable on-screen copy that drives action







This is a performance-driven creative role, not aesthetic-only editing.



Speed, Testing & Execution



• Work fast and prioritize execution over perfection



• Produce multiple variations within short timelines



• Implement feedback quickly so ads can launch and scale



• Maintain strong organization, deadlines, and accountability



• Operate with a testing mindset — constant iteration and learning







High output and responsiveness are expected.



Supporting & UGC / Organic Content (Secondary)



• Edit short-form product + site videos to improve CVR



• Turn influencer + internal footage into organic-style content



• Support TikTok, IG Reels, and Shorts when needed



• Add captions, transitions, sound, and branded elements



• Collaborate with the Social Media Manager on trends and direction



• Continuously analyze performance and refine creative



• You will stay highly organized across assets and projects, maintain structured Google Drive folders, and build clear creative playbooks and SOPs so workflows are repeatable and scalable.



•You will also be responsible for creating clear creative briefs and request docs, proposing ideas for the types of content, clips, angles, and shots needed from the founder, internal team, or UGC creators to produce stronger, higher-converting ad creatives.







Platform & Trend Awareness



• Stay current with TikTok, Meta, and UGC ad trends



• Understand behavior and performance patterns across platforms



• Track cultural + viral hooks relevant to U.S. audiences



• Bring trend-aware concepts that sell, not just trend-match







What We’re Looking For



• Experience editing paid ads or high-performing short-form content



• Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, retention, and storytelling



• Ability to create UGC-style ads that feel authentic but convert



• KPI-driven mindset, you care about results, not just visuals



• Organized, proactive, and comfortable with fast iteration



• Comfortable receiving and giving direct performance feedback



• Able to produce consistent high-volume creative output



You take ownership. You move fast. You think like a growth operator.







Must-Have Skills



• Experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, CapCut, or similar tools



• Proven ability to structure short-form content for conversion



• Ability to identify and extract the strongest 
nts from raw clips



• Experience writing or applying strong on-screen copy + messaging



• Understanding of how creative impacts CTR, ROAS, and performance



• Ability to suggest framing, pacing, or direction improvements when needed



Motion graphics experience is a plus.



*Tools: Nanabanana pro, adobe premier pro, capcut pro, Higgsfield ai, eleven labs, Runway, motion, figman and HeyGen 







Performance & Accountability



This role is evaluated on measurable creative impact, including:



• click-through rate (CTR)



• thumb-stop rate & scroll-stop performance



• retention & watch-time



• testing velocity & iteration quality



• contribution to ad efficiency and scale



Your edits are expected to drive results, not just look good.







Benefits & Growth



• Remote role (work from anywhere)



• Performance-based bonus potential



• Fast-growth startup environment



• High-impact creative ownership



• Free TopFoxx products



• Paid time off & company holidays



• Long-term growth opportunity into senior performance creative

Shopify:

s — especially for WISMO (Where Is My Order) cases

title: SEO Recovery Expert Needed – Diagnose & Restore Google Traffic
description:
We run a high-traffic content and discovery platform in a competitive niche. The site previously ranked well and drove significant organic traffic from Google, but most pages have now been deindexed, with only the homepage remaining.



This was not a gradual decline. It appears to be a broad deindexing event.



This is not a beginner audit. We are looking for someone who has dealt with penalties, deindexing, algorithm hits, or technical SEO failures and can clearly identify what went wrong and how to fix it.



What we need:



-Full SEO audit focused on why pages were deindexed

-Identify any manual actions, algorithmic penalties, or indexing issues

-Technical SEO review (crawlability, rendering, site structure, internal linking, etc.)

-Content quality and duplication analysis

-Backlink profile review (toxic links, unnatural patterns, etc.)

-Clear, prioritized action plan to recover rankings



Please answer:

A brief example of a similar recovery you handled

Your process for diagnosing mass deindexing

Tools you use (GSC, log analysis, crawlers, etc.)

title: QA ENGINEER
description:
We're Hiring: QA Engineer (Voice AI | Healthcare | Real-Time Systems)



We’re building in one of the toughest spaces: Voice AI + Healthcare + Real-time systems. Your mission? Break the product before our customers do.



This is a full-stack QA role. You’ll test everything — from voice interactions to backend systems — and take ownership of quality across the entire stack.



What You’ll Be Testing:

? Voice AI call flows (latency, interruptions, transcription accuracy, fallback handling)

? End-to-end booking flows (inbound call ? external system sync)

? REST APIs, webhooks, and async event pipelines

? Third-party integrations (each with unique failure modes)

? Concurrency, edge cases, and graceful degradation under load



 What We’re Looking For:

? 3+ years of QA experience (startup or fast-paced environments preferred)

? Strong API testing skills (REST, webhooks, Postman or similar tools)

? Hands-on automation experience (Playwright preferred)

? Ability to read backend code and write precise, actionable bug reports

? Solid understanding of async systems (queues, retries, idempotency, eventual consistency)



Strong Bonus:

? Experience with Voice AI or conversational systems

? Background in healthcare or HIPAA-compliant SaaS

? Experience with multi-tenant SaaS platforms

? Distributed or offshore team experience



This is NOT a manual click-testing role.

You automate. You think in systems. You own quality.



If this sounds like your kind of challenge, DM US YOUR WHATSAPP NO. Our team will reach out — once contacted, please be ready to send your resume.



THIS ISN'T A SIMPLE VA JOB OR ENTRY-LEVEL ROLE. WE'RE LOOKING FOR A LEGIT, CREDIBLE PROFESSIONAL FOR THIS POSITION.

title: Business Operations, Data and Financial Analyst
description:
We are a growing Australian healthcare and NDIS disability services group operating residential care, home care, respite and staffing services. Labour is our largest cost and service delivery is our biggest revenue driver — so understanding our numbers is critical. 



We are looking for a highly analytical Business Operations & Data Analyst to help us build visibility across revenue, labour cost, occupancy, and profitability.



This is NOT a data entry role and not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who enjoys working with numbers, building dashboards, and helping leadership make better decisions. 



Responsibilities



You will work directly with the business owner and senior managers to build and maintain operational reports, visualisations and dashboards and be responsible for extracting data, interpreting, visualising and then presenting to the team.



We need someone that can make the complicated uncomplicated and easy to understand, has a commercial focus, and can communicate clearly and visualise data and set goals. From the data, you will set goals. 



For example - someone that can come in, take a look at the cost of us sending work to agency, analyse the cost of our own staff, and then visualise the dollar figure of lost revenue last week/fortnight on agency cost. 



Your work will include:



- Overtime reporting including hours, dollar value, reason analysis and interpreting further (eg. x% of overtime was avoidable)

- Agency spend tracking

- Labour cost per service line (taking into account all of our expenses and determining the actual cost of hours sold)

- Bed occupancy %

- Care minutes invoiced vs paid

- Hours delivered by funding source and building breakeven points (eg. x hours sold to x organisation for breakeven)

- Setting goals for rostering staff to visualise how many hours need to be sold to increase revenue etc

- Breakeven modelling

- Building structured Excel or dashboards

- Presenting and developing clear summaries and reports with visualisations and charts for management to review 

- Setting KPIs and targets for staff based on data



(Our director runs a number of businesses and may request your assistance with other businesses for similar tasks also)



What we are looking for



- 4 years + experience in financial analysis, management reporting and operations analytics

- High proficient in excel (pivot tables, advanced formulas, dashboards)

- Understand labour-based businesses

- Be comfortable working with messy data and improving structure

- Be comfortable working with undeveloped systems and assisting to implement systems through your work 

- Be a strong, confident communicator that is highly experienced in your field

- Be able to provide examples of past work

- Ideally, someone with experience in an Australian market in the NDIS space 



The systems we currently use are Xero, Shiftcare, and Employment Hero, where most data will be kept. 



This is NOT a virtual assistant, data entry or social media role. This is an analytical, commercially focused role.



To apply, please
 us with your resume, a description of your past relative work, and attach a sample dashboard or report that you have created in the past.

title: Experienced Appointment Setter (Full-Time | US CPA Firm | EST Hours)
description:

Accuwise is a growing CPA firm based in Sarasota, Florida, and we are looking for experienced appointment setters to join our team.

-Schedule qualified appointments for our Sales Manager

-Follow up with leads via phone, SMS, and

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Long-Term, Growth Path Available)
description:
We are an established US-based business funding company building our in-house credit repair division. We help business owners access capital through strategic business credit and 0% APR funding solutions. Now we need a Credit Repair Specialist to handle credit work directly for our clients.



This is a long-term, full-time role. Strong performers will grow with the company.



What You Will Do



Pull and analyze tri-bureau credit reports

Identify disputable items and draft personalized dispute letters

Call credit bureaus and creditors directly to file and follow up on disputes

Use Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar software

File disputes through FTC, CFPB, and BBB when needed

Keep clients updated on their progress

Maintain accurate records of every dispute and outcome

Follow FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA compliance on every file



What We Need From You



At least 1 year of hands-on credit repair experience

Experience with at least one major dispute platform (Credit Repair Cloud, DisputeFox, or similar)

Comfortable making phone calls to US bureaus and creditors. This is part of the job, not optional.

Clear written and spoken English

Working knowledge of FCRA, FDCPA, and CROA

Stable internet (25 Mbps minimum), quiet workspace, working headset

Reliable, honest, and detail-oriented

Available full-time during US business hours



What We Offer



Base salary $900 to $1,500 per month, paid bi-weekly

$50 bonus for every client who completes credit repair and gets funded through RBC

Paid US holidays

Long-term position with room to grow

Direct mentorship from leadership

Stable role inside an established company



HOW TO APPLY



Start your reply with the word "FUNDING" so we know you read the post.



Then send us:



Your resume

A short example of a phone dispute you handled (which bureau or creditor, what happened, what was the outcome)

What credit repair software have you used

Your internet speed test screenshot

A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself in English

Your expected monthly rate

Applications missing the keyword or required items will not be reviewed.

We move fast. Strong applicants will hear back within 5 business days.

title: ConstructAid Specialized Operator
description:
We’re looking for a specialized, technical professional to support high-stakes healthcare construction projects in the U.S. This is not a general administrative role; we need someone who understands how buildings are put together, specifically regarding mechanical systems and healthcare standards.

Type: Part-time (Remote)

Terms: Long-term, Paid biweekly via Wise

Standards: No time trackers—we hire for results, detail, and extreme ownership.



——————————————————



Your Role Includes:

MEP & Design Coordination: Reviewing mechanical, electrical, and plumbing drawings to identify clashes and ensure coordination with architectural plans.

Healthcare Compliance: Reviewing project sets against FGI Guidelines and coordinating requirements for complex medical equipment (clearances, utility connections, etc.).

Pre-Construction Support: Partnering with our US-based Estimator to “interrogate” bid sets—finding gaps, missing scopes, and identifying risks before they hit the field.

Project Documentation: Managing technical RFIs, submittals, and drawing logs.

Technical Communication: Bridging the gap between the design team and the field, ensuring technical instructions are clear and actionable.



——————————————————



You’ll thrive if you:

Have a Technical Background: You likely have a degree or experience in Architecture, Civil/Mechanical Engineering, or Construction Management.

Speak the Language of MEP: You can navigate a 100-page drawing set and know exactly where to look for system conflicts.

Understand Healthcare Complexity: You are familiar with (or can rapidly master) healthcare-specific requirements like clinical flow and equipment backing.

Are an Expert Communicator: Fluent English is a must, as you will be summarizing complex technical issues for project owners.

Are Obsessively Organized: You enjoy building systems that prevent errors and keep timelines on track.



——————————————————





???? How to Apply

 
 with:

 • Your resume (highlighting your technical AEC experience).

 • A short intro video covering:

 • Who You Are: Your background in design or engineering.

 • Technical Connection: Specifically, your experience with MEP coordination or Healthcare projects.

 • Value Add: How your technical “eye” prevents mistakes on a job site.

title: Program Coordinator
description:
Who We Are:



Vermilion is a US-based arts educational organization dedicated to providing career support and opportunities to actors, filmmakers, and multi-hyphenate artists in film, television, and theater. The company has expanded over the past four years from our founder’s early days teaching acting at studios in New York City. The organization now includes a mentorship program, industry workshops, the Vermilion podcast, and a vibrant community of working artists from all across the United States. 



The Role:



Vermilion is seeking an enthusiastic go-getter Program Coordinator to manage operations, administration, and marketing. As Program Coordinator you’ll gain first-hand industry experience across Entertainment, Media, Marketing, Sales, and Arts Administration, receive hands-on professional development, and serve as the operational hub of the agency. This role is a critical part of the company’s culture and structure.



The Program Coordinator role consists of two distinct responsibilities: Operations and Marketing. These roles build on each other and provide unique exposure to the company, which allows you to develop your hard and soft skills. A successful Program Coordinator will help build the company alongside the founder, with the goal of expanding into an even larger role after one year. 



This Role Could Be Right For You If:



-You are curious about a career in the Entertainment and Media, and would love the opportunity to understand the inner working and business side of the industry

-You are extremely detail oriented and triple-check your work

-You are a self-starter who takes initiative to explore

-You have experience with Kajabi or other similar backend website tools 

-You enjoy film, television, and/or theater and want to be in the industry

-You thrive in a fast-paced environment and remain calm under pressure

-You do not back down from a challenge but rather enjoy finding a creative solution

 

Operations Responsibilities:



-Liaise with clients, students, and industry guests utilizing elite customer service skills

-Act as the voice of Vermilion by answering incoming
s and DMs

-Schedule meetings and coaching sessions and manage billing and invoicing

-Book studio and event space for classes and workshops

-Assist with the production of the Vermilion weekly podcast

-Online research relating to the film and television industry

-Creating Canva and Google Doc presentations

-Maintain confidentiality of all records and information pertaining to clients and guests



Marketing Responsibilities:



-Create and execute marketing campaigns including
 and social media content

-Copywriting and copy editing for a variety of media

-Supervise graphic design team for all marketing and promotional content

-Brainstorm brand campaigns and social media content creation

-Attend press and entertainment industry events alongside founder

-Create videography and photography content

-Monitor budgets for various campaigns

-Coordinate sales efforts, including Google AdWords and Meta Advertising



Qualifications:



-Undergraduate degree

-Demonstrated passion for Entertainment, Media, or Arts Administration

-Excellent customer service and networking skills

-Excellent interpersonal and problem resolution skills

-Ability to multi-task and meet deadlines

-Detail-oriented and extremely organized

-Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-volume environment

-Familiarity with Google Suite and Adobe Suite products

-Familiarity with Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

-Exceptional copywriting and content creation skills for diverse audiences

-Strong analytical skills with a focus on ROI measurement

 

Compensation:



The base hourly rate for this position is $7/hr for a minimum of 20 hours per week and a maximum of 40 hours per week. 



To apply, send your resume, a brief cover letter, and any relevant materials via message and we will reach out to a short list of applicants for an interview. Visit 
 for more information.

title: Video Editor who #Believes in Entrepreneurs| Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome Video Editor!’ in the subject line. Please apply through OnlineJobsPh and not via
. The job responsibilities include editing the first minute of videos to grab and keep the audience's attention, selecting the most engaging clips, adding eye-catching transitions and effects, ensuring the sound and visuals are top-notch, and staying on top of the latest trends to keep things fresh. Our goal is to get to 70% audience retention in the first minute. Additionally, strong creativity, attention to detail, and effective communication skills are essential to produce high-quality videos that engage viewers and meet retention goals. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! -Irish #Believe

title: Senior IT Support Engineer
description:
Location: Remote (Must work 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM in US Pacific Time Business Hours)



Type: Full-Time



About the Role

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Systems Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role is a unique blend of high-impact project implementation and advanced technical support. You won't just be "fixing PC’s"—you’ll be building environments, automating workflows, and ensuring our clients’ infrastructure is rock solid.



If you are a proactive problem-solver who thrives on documentation, automation, and delivering "white-glove" service, we want to meet you.



What Success Looks Like

-In this role, you aren’t just closing tickets; you’re improving the ecosystem. Success in the first 6 months looks like:

-Precision Execution: Escalated tickets are resolved permanently with "zero-leak" documentation, ensuring the issue never -returns.

-Standardization: Server builds and workstation deployments follow consistent, repeatable SOPs every single time.

-Automation First: You leverage PowerShell and RMM automation to eliminate "reactive noise" and recurring manual tasks.

-Quiet Confidence: After-hours support and high-pressure outages are handled with a calm, professional, and controlled -demeanor.

-Knowledge Sharing: Other technicians resolve tickets faster because of the documentation and tools you built.



Key Responsibilities

-Advanced Support: Provide L2 technical support for complex hardware, software, and network issues.

-Project Delivery: Plan and implement IT projects (migrations, server refreshes, network overhauls) on time and within scope.

-Infrastructure Management: Maintain and optimize desktops, Windows Servers, and cloud environments.

-System Maintenance: Proactively manage user equipment, security patches, and backups.

-Documentation: Maintain a "documentation-first" mindset, ensuring our PSA/Knowledge Base is always the single source of truth.



Technical Requirements

-Experience: 4–5 years in a dedicated L2 Support or Systems Administration role (MSP experience preferred).

-Microsoft Stack: Deep knowledge of M365 Administration (Azure AD/Entra ID, Intune, Exchange).

-Infrastructure: Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy, and Hyper-V virtualization.

-Networking: Strong grasp of VLANs, routing, switching, VPNs, and DNS/DHCP.

-Security: Experience with Firewalls (SonicWall, Fortinet, or Ubiquiti) and EDR/MDR platforms (SentinelOne, Huntress, etc.).

-Scripting: Strong PowerShell ability (you should be comfortable writing scripts, not just running them).

-Tools: Experience with PSA/RMM tools (SyncroMSP/Addigy) and Backup platforms (iDrive/E2).



Mindset & Qualities

-The "AI-Forward" Engineer: Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT to accelerate documentation, coding, and communication.

-Ownership: You don't wait for permission to fix a glaring process gap.

-Communication: Ability to translate "tech-speak" into plain English for our clients.

-Organization: You thrive in a structured environment and hate messy ticket queues.



Why Join Us?

-100% Remote: Work from wherever you are most productive.

-Career Growth: We pay for your certifications and provide structured training to keep your skills sharp.

-Innovation-Driven: We value automation over manual labor. If you find a better way to do something, we’ll listen.

-Supportive Culture: Join a team that values your input and prioritizes work-life balance.



Work Schedule

Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM PST. 1-hour lunch break included.



How to Apply

Ready to take the next step? Please send your updated resume (or a link to your CV) to

title: Course booking administrator
description:
About Us



We are a leading New Zealand-based training provider delivering practical, industry-aligned health and safety training. We work with companies across construction, infrastructure, and manufacturing to help their teams stay compliant, safe, and job-ready.



We are looking for a highly organised, detail-driven Course Bookings Administrator to support our sales team and help streamline our operations.



About the Role



This is a critical support role designed to remove administrative workload from our Account Managers so they can focus on sales and client relationships.



You’ll be responsible for managing bookings, maintaining system accuracy, organising sales inboxes, and ensuring customers receive fast, professional communication.



This role evolves over time:



Phase 1: Sales administration and scheduling accuracy

Phase 2: Customer communication and inbox management



Key Responsibilities



Sales Administration & Scheduling

Maintain 95%+ accuracy across CRM, booking systems, and scheduling tools

Process bookings, changes, cancellations, and transfers same day

Keep course schedules organised and planned at least 3 months in advance

Ensure fast and accurate handover from sales to operations

Complete booking updates within 30 minutes of request



 Management & Customer Support

Manage shared sales inboxes

Triage incoming enquiries and categorise them correctly

Respond to standard enquiries

Escalate qualified leads to Account Managers

Send booking confirmations and course information

Act as the first point of contact for customer queries



What Success Looks Like

Sales team has more time to focus on selling

No delays between sales and delivery teams

Clean, organised, and responsive inboxes

Customers receive fast, professional communication

Administrative errors are eliminated



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

95%+ system accuracy

Booking updates completed within 30 minutes

Course schedule maintained 3 months ahead

Fast response times to customer enquiries

Reduction in sales admin workload by at least 30%

Zero customer impact from admin errors



Skills & Experience

Experience in sales administration, customer service, or virtual assistant roles

Strong written English and communication skills

High attention to detail and accuracy

Ability to manage multiple systems and tasks simultaneously

Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot preferred but not required)

Highly organised, proactive, and reliable



Who We’re Looking For

You are:



Structured and detail-focused

Fast, responsive, and reliable

Comfortable working in a process-driven environment

Someone who takes ownership and solves problems

Able to work independently while supporting a team





How to Apply

We're scaling fast across three international markets and need a Senior Creative Strategist who can drive performance through creative — not just produce it.

You'll own the creative engine behind a €200K+/month ad spend operation. You'll identify winning angles, brief editors with precision, and build feedback loops between performance data and creative output. You'll be the link between what the numbers say and what gets made next.

This is a high-ownership, high-output role for someone who thinks in hooks, angles, and avatars — and who can scale creative volume without losing quality.

title: Facebook Ads Manager
description:
Virtual Assistant — Meta Ads (Syncova)

Type: Full-time, remote

Hiring company: Syncova — a marketing agency running Meta ads, AI-assisted creative, and sales funnels for Australian allied-health practices.



About the role

We're looking for a VA to own the day-to-day execution of Meta ad campaigns for our clients. You won't need to invent strategy — we hand you a Standard Ad Process (SAP) for every angle, and your job is to execute it cleanly, fast, and at volume.

You'll be the link between our creative system, our editor, and Ads Manager. If we ship 10 new ads a week for a client, you're the reason that happens on time.

You won't talk to clients. You'll work directly with the founders.



What you'll actually do

Day-to-day, the loop looks like this:



Script ads from our SAPs. We give you the framework, the angle, the proof points. You write the script.

Generate voiceovers in ElevenLabs. Pick the right voice, render the audio, QA it.

Hand off to our editor. We already have an assigned editor — you brief them and send the assets. No editing on your end.

Download the finished ad once the editor sends it back.

Write ad copy using our AI prompt (we'll give it to you), then upload the creative + copy into Meta Ads Manager and ship it.



Beyond the ad loop, you'll also handle:



Building and maintaining Go High Level assets — funnels, automations, calendars, landing pages.

Wiring up booking calendars and the automations that run behind them.

Light landing-page work in GHL.





What we need from you

Hard requirements:



Minimum 1 year of hands-on Meta ads experience. This is non-negotiable. If you've never been inside Ads Manager building campaigns, this isn't the role for you.

Previous marketing agency or in-house marketing experience. You should already understand what a funnel is, what a hook is, and why CTR matters.

C2 English proficiency. You're writing scripts and ad copy in English. Anything below C2 won't cut it.

Working knowledge of Go High Level — funnels, automations, calendar systems, landing pages. You should be able to open GHL and build without hand-holding.

Detail-oriented. Ad accounts punish sloppy work — wrong UTMs, missed pixel events, unpaused test budgets. We need someone who actually checks their work.



Nice to have:



ElevenLabs experience (we'll train you if not).

Experience working with Australian or US-based agencies.

Familiarity with info-product / coaching-business marketing.





How we work



Async-first. Clear briefs, clear deliverables, clear deadlines.

We document everything. You'll inherit SOPs for every recurring task.

We use AI tools heavily — ElevenLabs, Claude, custom prompts. You should be comfortable using AI as part of your workflow, not afraid of it.

We ship fast. If you like fiddling with one ad for three days, you'll hate it here.





How to apply

Send us:



A short note on your Meta ads experience — which accounts you've worked on, monthly spend you've managed, and the kind of offers you've run ads for.

One example of an ad script or ad copy you've written that performed well (and the numbers, if you have them).

A quick rundown of your GHL experience — what you've built, what automations you've wired up.



We respond to every application that includes all three.

title: Fashion creative designer
description:

We’re a fast-growing e-commerce company operating in the USA market, currently processing around 250 orders per day.



We’re building a long-term team of A-players who want to grow with us — not just for a few weeks, but for the long run.



What We’re Looking For

Minimum 1 year of experience in creative design for FASHION e-commerce or dropshipping brands

Proven experience working for a store doing $100K+ in monthly revenue

Deep understanding of Canva — this is where you’ll create all our ad creatives

Creative, but also structured and consistent in your workflow

Able to follow instructions closely and adapt to our design style over time

Basic understanding of Meta Ads 
 & Instagram) and how ad creatives perform

Your Main Tasks

Create simple, clean, and engaging ad creatives that fit our templates and tone

Follow our internal creative SOP and adjust your designs based on feedback

Communicate daily through Slack with the product and ads team

Keep all design files and project folders organized

What We Offer

Weekend-only start (Saturday & Sunday) with clear path to full-time role

Long-term position (we’re looking for someone to stay 6+ months minimum)

Flexible working hours depending on performance and communication

Weekly or bi-weekly payouts (depending on agreement)

Communication and task management via 

Growth opportunities within the team as we scale

Bonus structure based on creative performance and conversion results

Important



Only apply if:



You’ve read this entire post carefully

You meet all the requirements listed above

You’re serious about joining a long-term team that values structure, creativity, and consistency

You can provide examples of your previous work (preferably Canva designs or ad creatives)

title: B2B Appointment Setter (Cold Caller) – U.S. Dental Practices
description:
B2B Appointment Setter (Cold Caller) – U.S. Dental Practices



We are hiring a B2B appointment setter to call U.S. dental practices.



Todd Dental Operations helps dental offices recover revenue from missed appointments, inactive patients, unscheduled treatment, recall gaps, and front-office follow-up issues.



As TDO integrates to artificial intelligence outreach, candidate will eventually oversee outreach processes. 



This is a controlled outbound calling role focused on quality, professionalism, and accurate qualification — not mass dialing.



IMPORTANT (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



This role requires clear, professional English that U.S. business owners can easily understand on the first call.



You must be comfortable speaking with dentists, owners, and office managers.



This is not a multitasking job — you must be focused during calling hours.



If you are working multiple jobs, managing clients, or running your own business and cannot give full attention, do not apply.



If you do not have real cold calling experience, do not apply.



If you do not submit a voice recording, your application will not be reviewed.



COMMITMENT REQUIREMENT



This role requires focused attention during calling hours.



We are not looking for someone juggling multiple clients or treating this as a side task.



We are looking for someone who treats this as a primary role, can commit fully during scheduled calling hours, and takes ownership of results and performance.



This is a performance-driven position. Consistency and focus are required.



OPPORTUNITY



This is not a short-term gig.



Todd Dental Operations is a family-owned business under the Todd Family Trust, structured for long-term stability and generational ownership.



We are building a long-term operation and are looking for someone reliable who wants stability and growth.



If you perform and help generate real revenue, you will grow with the company.



We value reliability, discipline, professional communication, and clean CRM work.



COMPENSATION



Starting rate: $6–$10/hour (based on experience)

Paid trial: 10–20 hours



Pay increases:



Raise after 10-day trial

Raise after 3-week probation period



Performance bonuses:



$300 for each client that signs a contract

$100/month recurring for each active client you originated

No cap on bonuses



BONUS CONDITIONS



Bonuses are paid only when the client is a real, qualified dental practice, the appointment is properly documented in GoHighLevel (GHL), the call is recorded and verifiable, the client signs and remains active, and you remain in good standing.



Weak, fake, or unqualified appointments will not be counted.



EARNING EXAMPLE



5 clients = $1,500 signing + $500/month recurring

10 clients = $3,000 signing + $1,000/month recurring

20 clients = $6,000 signing + $2,000/month recurring



Strong performers can build long-term income.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Call assigned U.S. dental offices

Ask for dentist, owner, office manager, or decision-maker

Followscript (provided)

Log every call outcome in GHL

Write structured notes after meaningful conversations

Book only qualified discovery calls



REQUIREMENTS



Real cold calling experience (B2B preferred)

Clear, professional English (very important)

Confidence speaking with U.S. business owners

Strong attention to detail in CRM and notes

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Reliable internet and quiet environment



TO APPLY (REQUIRED)



1. Send a 60-second voice recording introducing yourself

2. Read this script clearly:



"Hi, this is calling on behalf of Todd Dental Operations. We help dental offices recover revenue from missed appointments, inactive patients, and unscheduled treatment follow-up. I was hoping to speak with the owner, dentist, or office manager."



3. Briefly describe your cold calling experience



4. Answer the following:

   Are you currently working other jobs?

   If yes, how many hours per day are you available for this role?



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.



FINAL NOTES



This role will be actively monitored.

Call quality, notes, and professionalism matter more than volume.

This is a performance-based opportunity, not a passive job.



ABOUT US



Todd Dental Operations is a U.S.-based company founded by a retired United States Army Officer.



We operate with a highly structured system using established tools and workflows inside GoHighLevel (GHL). This is a disciplined, process-driven environment.



We are a family-owned business under the Todd Family Trust, built for long-term stability and generational ownership.



We focus on execution, accountability, and measurable results for dental practices.



We are building a performance-driven team and are looking for long-term tea
mbers who want to grow with the company.

title: Senior Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
I run a residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California, and am looking for an experienced residential appraisal writer to join the team. The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for an experienced and senior level residential report writer to join our team.



Your role will be to do the following:

1. Complete the entire residential appraisal report after the appraiser has provided you with the inspection information and comparables. This includes all the commentary, adjustments, and all other parts of the report. We will provide training on how we specifically expect the commentary and adjustments based on our own personal preferences, however you are expected to already have this type of experience working for other appraisers.

2. Review the work of other report writers on our team, provide feedback, and help train newer report writers on our team. You are expected to act as the "last line of defense" of the report before it is sent to the appraiser for their final review before submission. As such, we expect you to be able to review the report, find any issues, correct these issues, and then send to the appraiser a near perfect report.



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have worked for a US residential appraiser

2. You have experience performing data entry for residential properties in the US

3. You have experience creating the 1004MC, selecting comparables, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, making adjustments to the sales grid, and making commentary for the addendum.

4. Ideally, you have experience managing other appraisal report writers.



If you don't have experience in writing commentary or the addendum, or do not have experience with making adjustments on the sales grid, we would still like to hear from you as we have a different job that would fit your experience better.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

title: Google Ads & YouTube Ads Specialist (Expert Level) — Part-Time Contract
description:
Google Ads & YouTube Ads Specialist (Expert Level) — Part-Time Contract



We're a Mac-based software company in the live streaming and video production space. Our customers are creators, podcasters, streamers, and professionals who produce video content. We have an active and engaged community, and our product sells on a subscription model with a free trial entry point.



We're looking for a contractor who has been in the trenches with Google Ads and YouTube Ads — not someone who took a course last year, but someone who has managed real budgets, made real mistakes, learned from them, and has the results to prove it.



What you'll be working on:

------------------------------------

- Managing and optimizing existing Google Search campaigns focused on trial sign-ups and event/campaign registrations

- Running YouTube in-stream and discovery ads targeting creators and professionals

- Audience strategy — layering intent, interest, and remarketing properly

- Conversion tracking — you need to know what's firing, what's not, and why it matters

- Weekly reporting with actual insight, not just screenshots of metrics

- Testing ad copy, creative angles, and landing page recommendations based on what the data is telling you



You must have:

---------------------

- Proven experience managing Google Ads and YouTube Ads for a software or SaaS product

- Demonstrated ability to drive trial sign-ups or subscription conversions (not just traffic or clicks)

- Deep understanding of Google's campaign types, bidding strategies, and audience tools

- YouTube-specific knowledge — in-stream, bumper ads, video action campaigns, audience targeting

- Clean conversion tracking setup experience (Google Tag Manager, GA4, or equivalent)

- The ability to write ad copy and create graphics as needed— you should be expert level here

- References or case studies you can share. We will ask.

- Fluent in English, written and oral



What this is not:

----------------------

- A full-time role. This is a part-time contract, up to 15 hours per week.

- A training ground. We have an existing account. We need someone who can get in, audit what's there, and start improving it — fast.

- A set-it-and-forget-it job. We expect active management and real communication.



Logistics:

-----------------

- Remote contract position

- Up to 15 hours per week

- You'll report directly and communicate in English — written and verbal clarity matters

- Payment in USD



To apply:

---------------

Send your application with the following:



- A summary of your Google Ads and YouTube Ads experience, specifically with software or SaaS products

- Examples of campaigns you've driven - visuals, copy

- Results you've driven — be specific. Numbers, not adjectives.

- At least one reference we can contact, ideally from a client whose campaigns you managed

- Your hourly rate

- Read everything carefully before you apply. At the very end of your application, include a fun fact about Canada that you learned — and put that same fun fact in your subject line. Applications without it will not be reviewed, no exceptions.

title: AI & Workflow Automation Specialist — 2-Month Project (Australian Business)
description:
We are an Australian business looking for an experienced AI and workflow automation specialist for a 2-month project, with the possibility of extension based on performance.



This is a hands-on build role — not a planning or strategy role. You will spend the majority of your time designing and implementing automations that eliminate manual work across our business operations. By the end of the project, we expect to have a set of live, working automations that our team uses every day.



WHAT YOU WILL WORK ON:



• Product sourcing & supplier outreach — build automated workflows to contact factories in China and other markets, collect pricing, compare product offers, and track responses without manual follow-up

• Freight forwarding — automate the process of reaching out to freight providers, collecting quotes, and comparing costs side by side

• Warehouse & 3PL operations — conduct a full workflow analysis of our third-party logistics operation and identify and implement automations to reduce cost and handling time

• Invoicing & stock management — map our current invoicing and stock holding processes, identify inefficiencies, and build automations that improve cash flow and reduce excess stock

• General workflow automation — any other manual, repetitive process across the business that can be eliminated or reduced through AI and automation tools



WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU:



• At least 2-3 years of experience building real automations for real businesses — not just theory

• Hands-on experience with Make (Integromat), Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms

• Experience using AI tools including ChatGPT or Claude to automate content, communications, and data processing

• Ability to connect and integrate different business platforms via API or native connectors

• Strong written English — you will be communicating directly with our Australian team

• Self-directed — you can work from a brief without needing constant supervision

• Experience with procurement, inventory, logistics, or supply chain workflows is a strong advantage



HOW TO APPLY:



Do not send a generic application. To be considered, your application must include:



• A short description (3-5 sentences) of a specific automation you have built — what the problem was, what you built, and what it saved

• A list of the automation tools and platforms you use regularly

• Your available start date

title: Web design & maintenance
description:
About us

The Design Forums connects architects, interior designers and property developers across the UK and Ireland through a portfolio of industry events including The Architects Forums, The Design Forums and Design Soiree. We organise RIBA-accredited CPD seminars, product showcases and networking events in over 12 cities.

We're building a paid job board for the architecture and design sector — a new revenue stream leveraging our existing industry audience. We need a WordPress developer to build it, launch it, and maintain it ongoing.



The role

:



Set up and configure a WordPress job board using WP Job Manager (or recommend a better plugin if you can justify it)

Build a clean, professional front-end that matches our existing brand and site design

Configure paid job posting with payment gateway integration (Stripe or PayPal)

Set up tiered pricing packages (e.g. single listing, featured listing, bulk packages)

Build employer dashboard — account creation, job submission, payment, listing management

Build candidate-facing search and filter functionality (by role type, location, salary, sector)

Ensure full mobile responsiveness

Set up
 notifications (new listings, application confirmations, expiry reminders)

Testing, bug fixing, and launch



Phase 2 — Ongoing maintenance and improvement (post-launch):



Monitor site performance, uptime, and fix issues as they arise

Plugin and theme updates, security patches, backups

Implement improvements based on user feedback and analytics

Add new features as the board grows (e.g. CV database, employer branding profiles, job alerts)

General website maintenance across our other pages (event listings, landing pages, content updates)

Basic SEO housekeeping — meta descriptions, page titles, site speed





Working pattern



10 hours per week, Monday to Friday

Core hours: 1pm–8pm Manila time — flexible within that window, but must be reachable during these hours

Weekly check-in call (day/time to be agreed)

Short daily update on tasks completed and anything blocked

Additional calls as and when required





Tools & systems



WordPress with Elementor

WP Job Manager (or equivalent — open to recommendations)

Stripe/PayPal for payment processing

Google Analytics and Google Search Console

Training provided on our specific site structure, but you must be confident building independently from day one





Equipment & setup required



Dedicated home office or quiet workspace

Stable, reliable internet connection

Working computer with webcam for video calls

Professional headset for calls





Who we're looking for



3+ years' WordPress development experience — not just page building, actual development (custom templates, plugin configuration, payment integration)

Proven experience building or maintaining a job board, marketplace, or directory site on WordPress

Strong with WP Job Manager or similar plugins (WPJobBoard, JBoard, Jeeves)

Comfortable with payment gateway setup and troubleshooting (Stripe, PayPal)

Strong eye for design — this board needs to look premium, not like a generic template

Able to work independently, solve problems without hand-holding, and communicate clearly when stuck

Strong written English — you'll be configuring user-facing copy, notifications, and system
s

Detail-oriented and thorough with testing



Bonus if you have:



Experience with WooCommerce

Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or Photoshop)

SEO knowledge beyond the basics

Experience with membership or subscription plugins

Experience in the architecture, design, or events sector

Knowledge of GDPR requirements for job boards handling EU applicant data

title: Ecommerce SEO Architect: Maximize the Potential of Google Merchant Center & Schema Markup
description:
Join our cutting-edge ecommerce SEO agency and lead the digital transformation of our clients. As a key strategist, you will be the visionary behind online visibility, optimizing Google Merchant Center and deploying high-impact schema markup implementations. Your mission: skyrocket organic traffic, enhance search performance, and ensure our clients not only meet but exceed standards of excellence in the competitive world of ecommerce.



Lantern Sol 

offers a unique opportunity to be part of an innovative team with a global impact, having generated over $100 million in online sales and developed 500+ custom websites and applications. Our culture fosters creativity and collaboration in an environment that provides total flexibility and autonomy to define your workspace and manage your time while participating in strategic international meetings.



We are looking for a passionate, results-driven leader with deep expertise in ecommerce SEO and exceptional mastery of Google Merchant Center and schema markup. This role offers exponential professional growth alongside industry experts in an environment that values continuous learning.



Competencies:   Ecommerce SEO Expert:



Extensive experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento.

Advanced optimization of product feeds in Google Merchant Center—ensuring data quality, precise categorization, and attribute mapping.

Proactive resolution of feed errors, guaranteeing strict compliance with Google Shopping policies.

Advanced Technical SEO Mastery:



Implementation and optimization of schema markup (JSON-LD) for product and collection pages, focusing on maximizing visibility.

Deep knowledge of 
 vocabulary (Product, Offer, AggregateRating) and its strategic application.

Expert use of tools such as Google Rich Results Test, Schema Markup Validator, and Google Search Console for continuous analysis and optimization.

Strategic Analyst & Problem Solver:



In-depth analysis of Google Merchant Center performance data and organic traffic, identifying key trends and opportunities.

Proven experience in A/B testing, CTR optimization, and conversion rate improvement, with a focus on measurable results.

Ability to resolve complex technical SEO challenges and optimize site crawlability and indexing.

Influential Communicator & Collaborator:



Exceptional communication skills to engage with clients and internal teams, delivering clear and persuasive insights.

Ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences, fostering understanding and collaboration.

Autonomy and the ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

Bonus Skills (Preferred):

Deep understanding of international SEO and multilingual/multi-currency ecommerce setups.

Advanced experience with tools like Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, and SEMrush for in-depth analysis and optimization.





If you are an Ecommerce SEO Architect driven by excellence and innovation, we invite you to join our elite team. Together, we will shape the future of ecommerce and propel our clients toward digital success.

?

Has an advanced level of English (written and verbal).



Apply here

title: B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer
description:
# Job Description: B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer



**Position Title:** B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer  

**Location:** 100% Remote  

**Employment Type:** Full-time  



---



## About the Company



We are an innovative B2B solutions provider specializing in digital transformation for modern businesses. We help companies streamline their operations by offering advanced e-invoicing, accounting, and financial solutions, all supported by powerful marketing and automation tools like GoHighLevel. We are looking for an ambitious, tech-savvy, and results-driven **B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer** to spearhead our online presence and drive lead generation across key Southeast Asian markets, specifically Singapore and Malaysia.



---



## Role Overview



In this fully remote role, you will be the engine behind our B2B pipeline growth and digital footprint. You will act as the digital voice and the first point of contact for our company. You will be responsible for creating and executing outbound lead generation strategies, managing our professional brand on LinkedIn, and taking care of our company website. 



Because you will be marketing technical financial and workflow solutions, you must be IT-savvy, able to understand diverse business models, and highly proficient in written and spoken English.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### 1. Lead Generation & Customer Outreach

* **Outbound Lead Generation:** Design and execute B2B outreach campaigns targeting decision-makers (CFOs, Finance Directors, and Operations Managers) on LinkedIn and
.

* **First Point of Contact:** Act as the initial point of interaction for potential customers, qualify leads, and determine their business needs.

* **Customer Enquiries:** Act as the first responder to incoming queries, providing clear, value-driven communication.

* **Regional Focus:** Leverage an understanding of the Singapore and Malaysian business markets to tailor messaging and drive targeted acquisition.



### 2. Digital Marketing,
 Marketing & Content Creation

* *
 Marketing:** Plan, set up, and execute bulk
 campaigns, automated nurture sequences, and newsletters using GHL (or related
ing tools) to turn prospects into qualified leads.

* **LinkedIn Management:** Build and elevate the company’s presence on LinkedIn, including managing the company page and posting industry-relevant content.

* **Content Writing:** Write compelling, high-converting marketing materials, short-form posts, and professional correspondence in English.

* **Website Management:** Manage and update the company website to ensure messaging remains accurate and aligned with our service offerings.



### 3. Workflow Automation & Technical Consulting

* **Understand the Tech Stack:** Master our digital offerings, specifically e-invoicing and financial solutions, and translate their value to prospects across diverse industries.

* **Automation & Strategy:** Utilize **GoHighLevel** (or similar CRM/automation platforms) to build, manage, and optimize lead-nurturing workflows and customer journeys.



---



## Performance Metrics (KPIs) & Targets



To measure success in your first few months, you will be evaluated against the following key onboarding targets:



* **Customer Acquisition Target:** Successfully onboard a minimum of **4 customers** to take up our Free-of-Charge (FOC) or Paid solution.

* **Enterprise Milestone:** Secure at least **1 Enterprise Customer** out of the required minimum customer acquisitions.



---



## Qualifications & Attributes



* **Experience:** Proven track record in B2B marketing, lead generation, or outbound sales.

* **Market Knowledge:** Past experience serving the Singapore or Malaysian markets is highly desirable.

* **Tech Savviness:** Comfortable discussing and demonstrating IT, accounting, finance, and e-invoicing solutions.

* **Platform Knowledge:** Hands-on experience or familiarity with **GoHighLevel (GHL)** or similar all-in-one marketing automation tools, including
 marketing modules, campaign creation, and list segmentation.

* **Communication Skills:** Exceptional proficiency in English, both written and verbal, with a knack for writing engaging business content.

* **Adaptability:** A fast learner with the ability to quickly understand the core nature of a prospect’s business and propose relevant solutions.



---



## What We Offer



* Competitive base salary with an attractive performance-based commission/bonus structure.

* Completely remote working arrangement with flexible hours.

* Opportunity to work with modern technologies and a dynamic team across the APAC region.



---



Would you like to explore tips on how to use LinkedIn automation to hit your enterprise customer KPI faster?

title: Customer Support & Chat Agent
description:
About us: BUFF is an online gaming platform committed to delivering a safe, enjoyable, and seamless experience for our players. As we scale, we're looking for a reliable and communicative Customer Support Executive & Chat Moderator to join our growing team.



This is a dual-function role -- you'll be responsible for both moderating our live chat environment and handling player support queries.



Responsibilities:

• Monitor and moderate player chat in real time to maintain a respectful and engaging community

• Respond to player queries, complaints, and feedback promptly and professionally

• Enforce platform guidelines fairly and consistently

• Provide accurate information regarding games, promotions, and account-related matters

• Identify and escalate suspicious activity or policy violations to the relevant team

• Collaborate with internal teams to resolve complex or escalated cases



What We're Looking For:

• Strong written communication skills in English

• Ability to multitask effectively in a fast-paced, online environment

• Prior experience in customer support, community management, or online moderation (preferred)

• Willingness to work flexible shifts, including evenings and weekends if required

• Familiarity with online gaming or betting platforms is an advantage

• Self-motivated, dependable, and comfortable working remotely

• Follows directions precisely and executes tasks in accordance with team guidelines and processes



What We Offer:

• Fully remote work setup

• A collaborative, player-first team culture

• Growth opportunities as the platform expands



Apply here: https://forms.gle/3xL9UhMSmanhpvmJ8

Because we serve many senior clients, clear and easy-to-understand English over the phone is essential for success in this role.



You will be a key part of delivering excellent client experiences while helping us stay organized and efficient.

? Responsibilities

Make outbound calls using GHL phone system:

Seminar reminders

Thank-you calls after seminars

Appointment scheduling

Move opportunities through pipeline stages as instructed

Ensure all client data is complete and up to date

title: Video Editor for Performance Ads Meta
description:
ABOUT US

We are a German Direct-to-Consumer supplement brand in the women's 

health space. Our entire creative workflow is AI-powered — from image 

generation to voice-overs to video clips. We produce high-performing 

direct-response ads for Meta and TikTok, targeting German-speaking 

women aged 35-55. (Brand name shared with shortlisted candidates.)



THE OPPORTUNITY

We are starting this role as PART TIME (around 20-30 hours per week). 

If you perform well during the first 4-8 weeks, we will upgrade you to 

FULL TIME with a higher monthly retainer. We are looking for a 

long-term editor, not a one-off freelancer. Our top performer can 

become our lead video editor and grow with the brand.



WHAT YOU WILL EDIT

60 to 180 second talking-head ads in UGC and authority style. Each ad 

combines:

- AI-generated video clips (Kling 3.0, Veo 3.1)

- AI-generated still images (NanoBanana Pro) that you will animate

- ElevenLabs voice-overs (in German — you do NOT need to speak German)

- Medical 3D visualizations

- Occasional real stock footage

All edited together in CapCut Pro.



REQUIRED HARD SKILLS

- Advanced CapCut Pro: keyframe animations, slide-in/pop-up overlays, 

  multi-track editing with 5+ tracks simultaneously (talking head, 

  B-roll, visuals, text overlays, audio, music)

- Voice-over-driven cutting: every cut must land precisely on the 

  spoken word. The voice-over sets the rhythm, NOT the music. This 

  is critical.

- Subtitle creation and styling: bold, colored, animated, with key 

  words highlighted in a different color. Subtitles must never cover 

  the face or important visuals.

- Text overlays for hooks, benefit callouts, and CTAs — cleanly 

  animated in and out, on-brand

- Infographic card overlays flown in over talking-head clips (e.g., a 

  card showing what each herb does, or a comparison table)

- Color correction and color grading to make AI-generated clips 

  visually consistent. AI clips often have slightly different color 

  temperature, saturation, and exposure — you must match them so the 

  final video looks like it came from one source.

- Audio mixing: voice-over loud and clear in the foreground, 

  background music subtle (15-20% of voice-over volume), clean 

  crossfades, no hard audio cuts

- Export in 9:16 (1080x1920) for Meta/TikTok, plus 1:1 versions when 

  requested



REQUIRED UNDERSTANDING

- Direct-response ad structure: Hook, Problem, Agitation, Mechanism, 

  Product Reveal, Social Proof, CTA. You don't need to write this — 

  but when editing you must FEEL where each section starts and ends 

  and match the visual rhythm to it.

- Pacing and cut rhythm: the hook (first 3 seconds) needs fast cuts 

  and visual surprise. The mechanism explanation needs slower cuts 

  so information lands. The CTA needs calm and clarity. You must 

  master this fast/slow alternation.

- Talking head ? B-roll switching every 3-8 seconds. Talking head 

  builds trust, B-roll proves or visualizes what is being said.

- Handling AI-generated clips: clips sometimes have artifacts, weird 

  first/last frames, imperfect lip-sync, unnatural hand movements. 

  You must know how to hide these issues — trim first/last frames, 

  use cutaways to B-roll at the right 
nt, light cropping/

  repositioning, smart transitions.

- Scroll-stopping hooks: the first 3 seconds d
 whether someone 

  keeps watching or scrolls away. You must be able to cut multiple 

  hook variations of the same ad for A/B testing.

- Audience awareness: our target is women 35-55, NOT Gen-Z TikTok 

  users. The aesthetic is warm, trustworthy, mature — NOT loud, 

  flashy, or Gen-Z. This is critical and most editors get it wrong.



NICE TO HAVE

- After Effects or DaVinci Resolve experience for animated 

  infographics, particle effects, kinetic typography

- Experience with Meta Ads Creative — knowledge of Hook Rate, Hold 

  Rate, Thumb-Stop Ratio

- Split-testing experience (different hooks, CTAs, visual styles)

- Experience editing health, wellness, or supplement-style ads with 

  a professional but not clinical look



WHAT YOU WILL RECEIVE FROM US

- Numbered clips (Clip 1 to Clip 46 etc.)

- Full ad copy as a text document

- Timing per clip with clear labels (talking head vs visual/B-roll)

- Final voice-over as audio file

- Mood references / example videos

- Brand colors, fonts, and logo files



WHAT YOU DELIVER

The fully edited video with subtitles, text overlays, music, and 

infographic overlays — export-ready in 9:16 (and 1:1 when requested).



WORK VOLUME & EXPECTATIONS

- Multiple new ads per week

- Fast turnarounds — first rough cut within 24-48 hours

- Heavy iteration — you will often be asked to cut 3 different hooks 

  for the same ad, change a CTA, or swap a scene. This is NOT 

  criticism, this is performance marketing. Editors who take 

  iteration personally will not work here.

- Creative freedom within structure: copy and clip order are fixed, 

  but transitions, zoom levels, text animations, and music choice 

  are yours.



GROWTH PATH

- Weeks 1-2: Paid trial period (1-2 ads to evaluate fit)

- Weeks 3-8: Part-time collaboration, building rhythm together

- Month 2+: If output and quality are strong, upgrade to full-time 

  position with higher monthly pay and lead editor responsibilities



LANGUAGE NOTE

The ads are in German, but you do NOT need to speak German. Subtitles 

will be reviewed by a German native speaker on our team. You only 

need to copy-paste subtitles correctly from the script we provide.



HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

1. Portfolio link (Google Drive, Vimeo, or website) — ideally with 

   at least 2 examples of direct-response or UGC-style ads you have 

   edited

2. Short answer (3-5 sentences) on this question: "When you receive 

   an AI-generated talking head clip with a weird first frame and 

   slightly off lip-sync, how do you handle it?"

3. Your CapCut Pro experience (months/years) and whether you also 

   use After Effects or DaVinci

4. Your available hours per week and time zone

5. Your rate (per hour OR per finished ad — your choice)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Ecommerce Operations & Customer Support Manager (Shopify / Fashion Dropshipping)
description:
We operate several high-volume fashion ecommerce stores using a dropshipping model across multiple markets.



This role is not a basic customer support position. We are looking for someone who understands how dropshipping operations work and who can manage customer issues, payment disputes, supplier communication and online reputation across several stores.



You will work directly with the founder and will play a critical role in maintaining operational stability and customer satisfaction.



MAIN RESPONSABILITIES: 



##Customer Support Operations

- Handle customer tickets related to orders, shipping delays, returns, exchanges and refunds.

- Maintain clear, professional communication with customers and resolve issues efficiently.



##Dispute & Chargeback Management

- Handle PayPal disputes and Shopify Payments chargebacks.

- Prepare and submit appropriate evidence through the resolution centers.

- Follow up on cases until resolution.



##Trustpilot & Reputation Management

- Monitor Trustpilot reviews.

- Respond to negative reviews in a professional and strategic way.

- Help maintain a strong reputation score across our stores.



##Supplier Coordination

- Communicate daily with multiple suppliers.

- Follow up on orders and shipping issues.

- Resolve operational problems such as stock shortages or shipping delays.

- Negotiate pricing and escalate issues when necessary.



##Operational Coordination

- Identify recurring operational problems.

- Escalate issues to management and suggest improvements to operational processes.



REQUIREMENTS:



##Mandatory Experience



- Minimum 2 years experience working with Shopify stores

- Experience working in ecommerce or dropshipping operations

- Experience handling PayPal disputes or payment chargebacks

- Experience managing customer support tickets

- Experience communicating with suppliers



##Preferred Experience



- Fashion ecommerce experience

- Trustpilot management experience

- Experience with ticket systems such as Gorgias, Zendesk or Freshdesk



##Skills



- Strong written English

- Highly organized and detail oriented

- Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

- Strong problem solving ability



##Salary



$800 – $1200 per month depending on experience.



Full-time position.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important)



To apply for this position, please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Step 1 —
 Subject



Send your application with the following subject line:



Fashion Operations Manager Application – [Your First Name]



Step 2 — Answer the Questions



Include answers to the following questions in your application:

 1. How many Shopify stores have you worked with?

 2. Describe your experience handling PayPal disputes or chargebacks.

 3. Have you ever managed a Trustpilot account? If yes, explain what you did.

 4. Describe your experience communicating with suppliers.

 5. What customer support systems or ticket systems have you used?

 6. Describe your experience in ecommerce or dropshipping operations.

 7. What is your expected monthly salary?



Step 3 — Loom Video (Required)



Record a Loom video (maximum 5 minutes) answering the following question.



Scenario:



A supplier informs you that 200 orders will be delayed by 10 days due to stock issues. At the same time, customers start contacting support and some open PayPal disputes.



In the video, explain step-by-step what actions you would take to manage this situation.



Please include the Loom link in your application.



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who understands how ecommerce operations work and can think clearly when solving operational problems.
