title: Wholesale Product Sourcing VA (Walmart & Amazon)
description:
Job Overview:

We are a US-based wholesale business selling on Amazon and Walmart marketplaces.

We work with established suppliers and product catalogs, focusing on sourcing and scaling proven products.

We are currently expanding our Walmart store, so experience with Walmart wholesale sourcing and listings is important for this role.



Responsibilities

- Work with new and existing supplier catalogs to identify products for Walmart (primary) and Amazon (secondary)

- Source and map products to Walmart listings first, then support Amazon sourcing as needed

- Create new listings and edit existing listings on Walmart Seller Central

- Upload images, update titles/descriptions, and fix listing issues

- Cross-check products between Amazon and Walmart

- Request pricing from suppliers (RFQs) when needed

- Analyze profitability (cost, fees, margins) using Google Sheets

- Support overall growth of Walmart (primary) and Amazon (secondary) channels



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of wholesale product sourcing experience (US marketplace)

- Experience with Walmart Seller Central (listing creation, editing, and issue resolution)

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central (US marketplace)

- Strong understanding of wholesale sourcing (not online arbitrage or dropshipping)

- Comfortable working with supplier catalogs, manual sourcing, and RFQs

- Ability to analyze profitability (cost, fees, margins, ROI)

- Familiar with Keepa and AZ Insight

- Good working knowledge of Google Sheets



Preferred:

- Experience with Sellify



To APPLY:

Please answer all of the following:



1. How many years of wholesale sourcing experience do you have? (US marketplace only wholesale experience, not online arbitrage or dropshipping. Also mention which product categories you worked on.)

2. Do you have Walmart sourcing and listing experience? If yes, how many years? Briefly explain your experience.

3. How many years of experience do you have using the following tools? Keepa, AZ Insight, Sellify (if any)

4. How many years of experience do you have working with supplier catalogs and RFQs? Brief explanation.

5. How many years of experience do you have with Amazon Seller Central (US marketplace)?



Please reply with detailed answers to all of the above questions and include your resume link.



DO NOT SEND AI-GENERATED RESPONSES.

title: AI Automation & Systems Specialist
description:
We're looking for a technically curious, systems-oriented operator who's comfortable inside automation tools and AI workflows — someone who can take ownership of a complex marketing setup, fix what's broken, and improve what's already there.                



This is not a software engineering role. Most of your work will involve improving and maintaining existing systems, not building from scratch. You'll work directly with the founder of a small operations agency. Our main client is an established US business that sells turnkey businesses to investors and runs 400–500 sales appointments per month through a heavily automated funnel. You'll own and improve that funnel — and over time, help us bring the same capability to other clients.





What We Care About Most                                                               

   

1. Strong communication. You write clearly, explain technical things in plain language, and raise issues early.

2. Problem-solving instinct. When something breaks, you investigate — trace the workflow, find the root cause, and propose the fix.                                   

3. Comfort with complexity. You're not put off by unfamiliar systems or messy problems. You lean in and figure things out.                                          





What You'll Do                                                                        



- Own our GoHighLevel setup — a sub-account with complex workflows, pipelines, AI caller handoffs, and rebooking sequences. You'll bring order, document it, and keep it running smoothly.

- Maintain and extend our Make automations that move data between the CRM, AI callers, and other tools.                                                                     

- Support our AI voice callers (Vapi) — update scripts, refine the assistant prompts, and keep the booking flow connected to our calendar.

- Use AI tools to analyse and generate marketing funnel reports — turning raw CRM data into clear insights we can act on.                                                   

- Build lightweight tools and automations using Claude Code, Cursor, or similar AI tools.                                                                                

- Troubleshoot independently — when something breaks, you find the cause and fix it without needing to be walked through.





Who You Are



- Proactive, high-level English communicator. You don't go quiet for a day.

- Detail-oriented. You name things properly, document as you go, and leave systems cleaner than you found them.

- Comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and integrations — you don't need to be a developer, but you understand how data flows between tools.                           

- You use AI tools daily — ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor — they're a core part of how we work.                                                                                 

- You take ownership and move things forward without constant direction.





Required Experience



- GoHighLevel — building workflows, pipelines, and multi-channel sequences. Show us a 

portal you've worked on.

- 
 (or Zapier / n8n) — multi-step scenarios, webhooks, and connecting tools

via APIs. Show us a scenario you've built.                                            

- Practical experience troubleshooting automations in real systems (not just tutorials).                                                                           

- Confident implementing AI tools and automations (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) to maximise efficiency and output.



Nice to have: AI voice platforms (Vapi, Retell, Bland), experience with custom AI agents, OpenAI / Anthropic API, marketing instincts for reviewing copy.





Hours



- Full-time, 40 hrs/week.

- US East Coast overlap required — realistically a ~5pm Manila start.

- Not on-call. If something breaks at 2am, we fix it the next day.





Compensation



- $1,800–$2,000 USD/month, depending on experience. Flexible above range for the right candidate.

- 3-month probation at full rate, or a paid 2–4 week trial first depending on portfolio and interview.                                                              

- Long-term role with rate reviews and growth into broader AI agency work as we onboard more clients.                                                                 





Why It's Worth Taking



- Real ownership — you'll be the systems person.

- Modern stack and varied work — including new projects with Claude Code and AI Agents.

- Direct line to the founder, fast decisions.

- We want to invest in you long-term.





How to Apply                                                                          



Subject line: Automation Specialist — PURPLE COMPASS — [Your Name]                    



Include:



1. Short intro in your own words - videos are welcome!

2. Evidence of work - screenshots or short videos of real GHL workflows, Make

scenarios, or tools you've built. (CV or Portfolio)                                                                                                                   

3. Expected monthly rate (USD) and earliest start date.

4. Confirmation you can work the night-shift hours.

5. Please include the keyword “PURPLE COMPASS” in your application.

title: Sales & Social Media Manager
description:
ABOUT PRESTIGIOUS CRAFT

Prestigious Craft is a boutique product studio based in Los Angeles. We build MVPs, prototypes, AI-powered products, and custom digital tools for founders, local businesses, startup teams, and corporate innovators. Our clients come to us with an idea — we turn it into a working product.

We are growing fast and looking for a driven, polished Sales & Social Media Manager to help us find clients and grow our brand presence online. This is a 100% commission role with strong earning potential — the right person can earn $1,500–$4,000+ per month based on performance. Opportunity for base salary in future DOP.





THE ROLE

This is a dual role. On the sales side, you will identify leads, conduct outreach, qualify prospects, and book discovery calls. On the social side, you will manage and grow our LinkedIn presence — writing posts, engaging with our audience, and building the Prestigious Craft brand in front of the right people.

This is not an order-taking role. We need someone who is proactive, creative, and genuinely excited about technology and business. You should be comfortable talking to founders and executives AND writing compelling content that stops people mid-scroll.





WHAT YOU'LL DO — SALES

Research and identify ideal client prospects using LinkedIn, directories, and social platforms

Conduct personalized outreach via LinkedIn,
, and other channels

Follow up consistently with leads — 5 to 7 touch point sequences

Qualify prospects by understanding their needs, timeline, and budget

Conduct initial discovery calls to uncover pain points and project requirements

Book qualified discovery calls onto the founder's calendar

Maintain and update the CRM (Google Sheets or similar) daily

Report weekly on outreach activity, pipeline status, and conversion metrics





WHAT YOU'LL DO — LINKEDIN & SOCIAL MEDIA

Manage the Prestigious Craft 
pany page and founder's personal LinkedIn profile

Write and publish 3 posts per week — educational content, case studies, behind-the-scenes, and direct offers

Engage with comments, respond to DMs, and grow our follower base organically

Identify trending topics in tech, AI, and startups and create timely content around them

Monitor LinkedIn analytics and adjust content strategy based on what performs

Repurpose content across other platforms (Instagram,
/X) as needed

Collaborate with the founder on content ideas, brand voice, and messaging





WHO YOU ARE

Fluent in English — written and spoken — with excellent communication skills

Experienced in B2B sales, business development, or lead generation (2+ years preferred)

Comfortable conducting discovery calls and asking qualifying questions

Familiar with ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) development and targeted outreach

Experienced managing LinkedIn pages and writing professional content that drives engagement

A strong writer — you can match a brand voice and write posts that feel human, not corporate

Self-motivated and able to work independently without daily supervision

Persistent and resilient — you don't give up after one "no"

Tech-savvy and comfortable discussing apps, software, and digital products at a high level

Organized and detail-oriented — you keep accurate records and follow through

Coachable — you take feedback and apply it quickly





NICE TO HAVE

Experience selling tech, software, or creative services

Familiarity with tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, or similar

Experience with social media scheduling tools like Buffer, Hootsuite, or Later

Previous experience in a startup or agency environment

Understanding of MVP development, app builds, or AI products

Basic graphic design skills for creating social content (Canva is fine)





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE

This is a 100% commission role. Here is how you earn:

Referral / Warm Intro Only

10% of the closed project value, paid 30 days after the client deposit clears.

Active Sales (Discovery Call Through Close)

20% of the closed project value. Paid in two installments: 10% at client deposit, 10% at project delivery.

Example Earnings

Close one $5,000 Proof of Concept project ? you earn $1,000

Close one $12,000 MVP project ? you earn $2,400

Close two projects per month at $10,000 average ? you earn $4,000/month

There is no cap on earnings. The more you close, the more you make.





HOW WE WORK

We are a fully remote team. You will communicate with the founder via Slack, WhatsApp, or
. Weekly check-ins are required. You set your own schedule — we care about results, not hours.

We will provide you with: a clear ICP, outreach scripts and templates, a service deck and one-pager, objection handling guides, and access to our CRM. You bring the hustle.





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please send the following to 
 with the subject line: SDR Application – [Your Name]



A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) — tell us who you are, your sales and social media background, and why you want this role. Loom or Google Drive link is fine.

Your resume or a brief summary of your relevant experience

One example of a cold outreach message you have written or would write to a potential client of Prestigious Craft

One example LinkedIn post you have written or would write for Prestigious Craft — show us your content voice



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed.



We review applications on a rolling basis. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a 20-minute video interview with the founder.

title: AI Content Creator - Short form Instagram Reels
description:
Ilic Group LLC · Full-time · Work from home



About the role



Hey! We're Ilic Group, and we run a large-scale short-form content operation across Instagram and
 — multiple accounts, multiple avatars, and a seriously organized production system. We're growing fast and looking for a creative, detail-oriented person from the Philippines to join our content team as an AI Content Creator.



This isn't a traditional video editing role. You'll be working with cutting-edge AI tools to produce short-form videos — mainly avatar-led recipe and wellness remedy content — by recreating and adapting viral video formats we provide. Everything is structured: you'll get daily tasks through our platform, so you always know exactly what to do and when.



What you'll do



- Receive daily content tasks through our internal platform (InstaFlow) — no guesswork involved

- Use AI video tools to produce short-form avatar-led videos based on proven viral formats

- Recreate recipe and wellness remedy videos with our character avatars speaking on screen

- Follow simple creative briefs to match the style, tone, and format of each avatar

- Submit completed videos through the platform for review — clean, consistent, on time



Tools you'll use



- NanoBananaPro

- Veo 3.1

- InstaFlow (our platform)

+ new tools as they launch



Don't worry if you haven't used these before — we'll walk you through everything. What matters most is that you're comfortable learning new AI tools quickly and following a process.



What we're looking for



- Based in the Philippines with reliable internet and a decent computer setup

- Comfortable using AI-powered tools — or excited to learn them fast

- Detail-oriented and able to follow creative briefs closely

- Reliable, consistent, and communicates well in English

- Previous content creation or video editing experience is a plus, but not required



What we provide



- All accounts provided

- All tools provided

- Platform access (InstaFlow)

- Daily tasks & clear briefs



We're a serious, established operation — not a side project. You'll have structure, support, and access to professional tools from day one. As we grow, new tools get added and you'll grow with us. If you're someone who likes knowing what's expected, works independently, and genuinely enjoys creating content, this is a great fit.

title: Calling All Client Onboarding Specialists!!
description:
WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING WITH US…



Ascend Innovation is a fast-moving, systems-driven company focused on helping businesses improve customer engagement through automation, AI tools, and streamlined processes.



We build structured systems that eliminate missed opportunities and help our clients operate more efficiently.



You’ll be joining a startup environment where systems matter, details matter, and your work directly contributes to real outcomes for clients.



We provide clear SOPs, structured onboarding, and ongoing support to help you succeed in your role.



We believe in long-term tea
mbers and actively look for ways to help you grow, take on more responsibility, and develop your skills over time.



You won’t just be completing tasks, you’ll be playing a key role in helping new clients join our company and building the systems that power our process.



THE ROLE WE ARE HIRING FOR



We are hiring a Client Onboarding Specialist (GoHighLevel)



This role is focused on onboarding new clients into our systems using GoHighLevel and following detailed SOPs to ensure every client account is set up correctly and efficiently.

title: GUEST EXPERIENCE SPECIALIST — EVENING / LATE-NIGHT SHIFT
description:
Haus Vacation Rentals | 100% Remote | 32 hours/week





ABOUT HAUS



Haus is a boutique short-term rental management company running 14 properties across the Hudson Valley, Catskills, and Berkshires. We're a small team that takes pride in guests feeling like they're talking to a knowledgeable local, not a script. We pair professional systems with the personal touch of a thoughtful host.





THE ROLE



We need someone to own the evening and late-night guest experience — the after-dinner booking inquiries, the "we just got in and the lockbox isn't working" texts, the questions that come in while our daytime team is asleep. You'll be the person guests reach when most managers have gone dark.



This is a calm, focused shift. Most evenings are quiet with steady, manageable volume — but when something goes wrong at midnight on a Friday, you're the one who keeps it from becoming a 1-star review.





SCHEDULE



32 hours/week across 6 days. Tuesdays off.



In Eastern Time (where our guests live):

- Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday: 10:00pm–2:00am

- Saturday & Sunday: 6:00pm–2:00am



In Manila Time:

- Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday: 10:00am–2:00pm

- Sunday & Monday: 6:00am–2:00pm



If you live in another time zone, we can map it for you — but you must be working during US East Coast evening hours.





WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO



- Respond to guest messages on Airbnb, VRBO, 
, direct, and SMS — usually within 5 minutes

- Handle check-in issues: lockbox codes, WiFi, finding the property in the dark, "the heat won't turn on"

- Triage real emergencies (no water, power outage, broken lock) — coordinate with on-call vendors and escalate to the founder when warranted

- Log issues in Airtable so the daytime team picks up where you left off

- Reply to incoming booking inquiries and pre-stay questions — your responses convert lookers into bookings

- Monitor and respond to reviews when they post during your shift

- Keep clean handoff notes for the morning shift





TOOLS WE USE



Hostaway (PMS), Airtable (ops database), Slack (team comms), Quo / OpenPhone (calls and SMS), Google Workspace. Training provided — we care more about judgment and writing than tool experience.





WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Writes like a person, not a script. "Hey — checkout's at 11, but I can stretch it to noon if the cleaner schedule allows. Let me check." Not "I would be more than happy to assist you with your inquiry regarding checkout."

- Calm under pressure. A guest texting in panic at 1am needs you to slow them down, not match their energy.

- Reads context. A short question gets a short answer. A worried guest gets a longer one.

- Reliable internet, backup power, quiet workspace, and a working headset. You'll be on calls.

- English fluency — both written and spoken.

- Hospitality, customer service, or STR experience is a plus but not required. Voice and judgment matter more.





COMPENSATION



$5.00 USD / hour, paid weekly via Wise.





HOW TO APPLY



Send the following to 



1. A short writing sample — pick one and write the response you'd send:



   - A guest texts at 11:47pm: "we're at the property and the lockbox code isn't working. we've been driving for 5 hours."



   - A guest sends an inquiry at 2am: "Is your cabin pet-friendly? We have a 60lb rescue dog who's well-behaved. Looking at the long weekend in October."



2. A 60-second voice recording — introduce yourself and tell us about a time you turned around a frustrated customer or guest. We want to hear your voice and how you tell a story.



3. A brief note on your current setup (internet speed, backup power, headset).



Attach your résumé too — but we'll read the writing sample and voice memo first.

, calls, follow-ups)

title: YouTube Shorts Video Editor — Medical Podcast (HuMED)
description:
Hi! I'm Dr. David Spiro, host of HuMED — a podcast where I interview physicians about their stories, expertise, and the behind-the-scenes of modern medicine. Our YouTube channel has 60,000 subscribers and is growing fast. I'm looking for a reliable, creative video editor to help me turn our long-form podcast episodes into engaging YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels.

What you'll do:



Edit 8–12 vertical short-form videos per week (roughly 30–60 seconds each) from full podcast episodes I provide

Identify the strongest "hook" 
nts in each episode and cut them into self-contained clips

Add clean, accurate captions/subtitles (large, readable, properly placed in the safe zone)

Add light B-roll, zooms, or visual emphasis where helpful (no over-editing — keep it clean and professional)

Apply consistent branding (HuMED logo placement, colors, font — I'll provide a brand kit)

Export in 9:16 ratio, optimized for YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels

Deliver finished videos in a shared folder (Google Drive or Dropbox) on an agreed schedule



What I'm looking for:



Strong English comprehension — you need to understand spoken medical conversations well enough to identify the most compelling 
nts

Experience editing short-form vertical content (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

A good eye for pacing, hooks, and what makes a clip "stop the scroll"

Reliable communication — responsive on
 during agreed hours

Self-starter who can work from a brief without heavy hand-holding

Bonus: experience with medical, health, education, or interview-format content



What I offer:



Steady, long-term work (this is not a one-off project)

Clear briefs, brand guidelines, and feedback so you can do your best work

Opportunity to grow with the show — more hours and higher pay as we scale

Respectful, professional communication



To apply, please send:



A short note about yourself and why you're interested

2–3 examples of vertical short-form videos you've edited (especially talking-head or interview-style)

Your hourly rate and weekly availability

Your typical turnaround time per Short



The first week will be a paid trial — I'll pay you to edit 3 sample Shorts so we can see if we're a good fit before committing long-term.

Thanks for reading — I'm excited to find the right person to grow this show with!

title: AI Growth & Automation Specialist (Healthcare – PCP & Pain Management)
description:

We are seeking a highly results-driven AI specialist to design, deploy, and optimize AI-powered lead generation and patient acquisition systems for a medical practice focused on Primary Care and Chronic Pain Management.

This role is not theoretical. The primary goal is simple:

Increase qualified patient volume and booked appointments using AI systems.

, voice)

• Integrate AI agents with:

3. Automation & Conversion Optimization

o Lead ? Response ? Qualification ? Booking ? Reminder ? Show-up 

• Reduce no-shows using AI reminders and re-engagement 

• Improve conversion rates from inquiry to booked visit 

 

4. Analytics & Performance Tracking

• Track and report: 

o Cost per lead 

o Cost per booked patient 

o Show rate 

o ROI on campaigns 

• Continuously optimize based on real data (not assumptions) 

 

Required Qualifications

• Proven experience in AI agent development (chatbots, voice agents, automation systems) 

• Experience in lead generation for local service businesses (healthcare preferred) 

• Strong understanding of: 

o CRM systems 

o Scheduling integrations

MANDATORY: Proof of Work (Non-Negotiable)

Applicants MUST provide:

2. Measurable Results

• Before/after metrics: 

o Leads generated

o Cost per acquisition

3. System Walkthrough

• Explanation of: 

o Tools used 

o Architecture of the AI system

What success looks like

Month 3: Hitting or approaching 100 consults/week target with a sustainable, low-touch system

Compensation

Please TEXT your name and information to

title: Full-Time Creative Virtual Assistant
description:

We are looking for a full-time Creative Virtual Assistant who can create high-quality base images made specifically for video advertisements.

Your responsibility is to create the foundation image — the main visual that everything starts from.



These base images will later be used by our animation team for B-roll creation and by our video editing team for final advertisements.



You are the first and most important step in the creative process.

You will work from storyboard briefs created by our video editors. Based on these briefs, you must create strong, realistic, high-converting visual assets that feel premium, trustworthy, and natural.

there should be almost no visible difference between your work and reality.



We are looking for someone with very high standards, strong taste, attention to detail, and someone who understands what makes an ad look expensive, trustworthy, and built to convert.



You will be joining a fast-growing international e-commerce brand with a 15-person marketing team focused heavily on performance marketing and creative testing.

 performance

description:

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Listing Coordinator / Transaction Coordinator Application



_____________________________________________________________



We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.





IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



===============

ABOUT THE TEAM

===============



Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!  

Why should you partner with us? WE ARE NOT YOUR ORDINARY CLIENT! 
 



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 



===============

Our Core Values:

===============





DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



===============

ABOUT YOU

===============



Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.



===============

RESPONSIBILITIES

===============



Transaction & Listing Management



Contract-to-Close Ownership: Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.

Strategic Preparation: Execute comprehensive pre-listing and pre-offer checklists to ensure every property and offer is positioned for success.



Technical Research Briefs: Develop detailed research briefs including property mechanicals and a verified timeline of large home system replacement dates

Market Intelligence: Prepare listing agent comps and pricing directives to support senior brokers in high-level strategic positioning.

Offer Packet Coordination: Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 

Compliance & Auditing: Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.

Closing Logistics: Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.

Project & Operations Management

 & Communication Prep: Draft
 prep templates for senior brokers to streamline high-level communication with clients and high-stakes partners

System Building: Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.

SOP Documentation: Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.

KPI Reporting: Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.

The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.







===============

REQUIREMENTS

===============



Experience & Capability

Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associat

Preferred BPO Experience: Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.

Project Management Experience: Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.

Automation Mindset: Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.

Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required. Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.

Work Style & Standards

Extremely Detail-Oriented: You find the needle in the haystack every time.

Near-Native English: Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.

Proactive Ownership: You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.

Speed & Urgency: You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses

Technical Requirements

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).

Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST).

Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS

STEP 1: Application



Please submit your application 





To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview

If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview

Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check

This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period

If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 

During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.

title: Quality and Size charts
description:
Dear applicant,

We run a dropshipping business with multiple stores in different countries.

We are looking for long-term employees to join our team. There is a great deal of growth opportunity for those that consistently make a positive contribution to our company. We are seeking great candidates that will represent the company with great attention to detail and dedication.

Therefore, please apply the word strawberry before you introduce yourself.

Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we feel is necessary for this job.



This is a Size Chart & Quality Control job where you would have to follow a very clear process to ensure our product listings meet our standards, but which will become very simple when you understand every step.

MUST HAVE KNOWLEDGE OF THESE PLATFORMS:



Shopify (eCommerce platform)

Google Sheets (for logging and reporting)

Slack (communication channel)

ChatGPT (for prompts + translations)

DeepL (for translation)





Responsibilities:



Reviewing and verifying size charts across all product listings for accuracy and consistency.

Performing quality checks on high volumes of products on a daily basis.

Flagging incorrect, missing, or inconsistent product information.

Reporting findings clearly into Google Sheets.

Contributing to our documentation and improving our quality control processes.

Generating weekly reports per store.

Taking on additional tasks as you grow within the role — you will be trained and supported every step of the way.

Demonstrate a high level of professionalism and accuracy at all times.

We maintain strict turnaround times, so all assigned checks must be completed within the agreed timeframe.





We will provide you with:



Video training

SOP's to follow

Checklists and worksheets

Access to the team lead to answer all your questions





Applicant needs to:



Speak fluent English both written and verbally

Minimum 1–2 years of experience in eCommerce, product management, or a similar detail-oriented role

Be available for and open to team calls

Must be organized, motivated, and willing to learn and grow

Available to join immediately

Be available for a minimum of 40 hours per week once asked to start full-time — we will start with a two-week trial and then move from part-time to full-time



This means that in the ideal situation you are currently not working for other full-time jobs.



Ultimately, we want to work with someone who has a sharp eye for detail, takes pride in accuracy, and is eager to grow their responsibilities over time. We don't want any inconsistency in the work delivered.

Examples of what we want to avoid:



Approving incorrect or mismatched size charts

Incomplete quality checks

Inaccurate or rushed reporting





Please respond by telling me what similar experience you have had before and tell me why you think you are a good fit for this job!

I look forward to your proposal.

Thank you,

Sem

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead marketing initiatives and drive brand growth. The ideal candidate will develop and execute strategic marketing plans across digital and traditional channels, manage campaigns from ideation to execution, and analyze performance to optimize results. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Creative teams to ensure brand consistency and maximize outreach.



Primary Responsibilities:



Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and support sales goals.



Plan and manage multi-channel marketing campaigns, including digital (SEO, SEM, social media,
) and offline (events, partnerships, print).



Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitive landscape, and opportunities for growth.



Oversee content creation for websites, blogs, newsletters, social media, and advertising campaigns.



Manage and optimize digital marketing tools and platforms (CRM, marketing automation, analytics).



Set KPIs, track campaign performance, and prepare regular reports on ROI, engagement, and other key metrics.



Work closely with internal teams and external agencies/vendors to execute projects on time and within budget.



Lead and mentor a team of marketing professionals (optional, if managing a team).



Ensure brand consistency across all channels and touchpoints.



Requirements:



Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or related field (Master’s degree is a plus).



3–7 years of experience in marketing, preferably in [industry if needed: tech, consumer goods, B2B, etc.].



Proven experience designing and executing successful marketing campaigns.



Strong knowledge of digital marketing, SEO/SEM, analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.).



Excellent communication, project management, and organizational skills.



Creative thinking and strong analytical skills.



Ability to work independently and as part of a cross-functional team.



Preferred Qualifications:



Certification in Digital Marketing, Google Ads, or Analytics.



Experience managing budgets and external agencies.



Familiarity with graphic design tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Creative Suite) is a plus.

description:
COO / Operations Lead  with CEO PATHWAY– Todd Dental Operations



Todd Dental Operations is hiring a COO / Operations Lead to help implement, manage, and scale the company’s operating system.



This is not a basic VA role. This is an operations leadership role for someone who can build structure, manage people, enforce standards, and turn a founder-led business into a repeatable operating company.



Todd Dental Operations helps U.S. dental practices recover revenue from missed appointments, inactive patients, unscheduled treatment, recall gaps, and front-office follow-up issues.



---



IMPORTANT (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



This is a high-discipline role.



You must:



* Follow structure

* Be on time

* Be consistent

* Take ownership of results



If you are managing multiple clients or cannot give full attention to this role, do not apply.



If you are looking for a passive or low-responsibility job, do not apply.



---



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



You will be responsible for building and managing the operating system of the company.



This includes:



* Creating SOPs and checklists

* Building daily, weekly, and monthly operating rhythms

* Managing appointment setters and outbound workflow

* Enforcing CRM discipline inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

* Tracking KPIs (calls, conversations, appointments, show rate, close rate, clients)

* Building reporting dashboards

* Managing remote team performance

* Running Day 3, Day 10, and 3-week reviews

* Supporting client onboarding processes

* Identifying problems and fixing them quickly

* Reducing founder involvement in daily operations



---



GOHIGHLEVEL (GHL)



You must be comfortable working inside a CRM.



Experience with GoHighLevel is preferred.



You will be responsible for:



* Pipeline management

* Contact status updates

* Workflow visibility

* Data cleanliness

* Reporting accuracy



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Operations management experience

* Sales operations or appointment-setting experience

* CRM experience (GHL preferred)

* Remote team management experience

* Strong written and spoken English

* Ability to create SOPs, checklists, and reporting systems

* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to enforce accountability



---



NON-NEGOTIABLES



* You must be organized

* You must document work

* You must communicate clearly

* You must follow structure

* You must hold people accountable

* You must not need constant supervision



---



CEO PATHWAY



This role has the potential to grow into CEO-level responsibility.



This is performance-based and depends on:



* Operational control

* Revenue production

* Clean reporting

* Team accountability

* Client retention

* Founder time reduction

* Profitability



CEO responsibility is earned through results, not given by title.



---



COMPENSATION



* Starting trial: $8–$15/hour (based on experience)

* Paid test: 10–20 hours



After trial:



* Pay increase based on performance

* Potential long-term role with higher compensation



If you are producing results equivalent to an American COO, your pay will be equivalent. 



---



FIRST 30-DAY OBJECTIVES



* Document operating model

* Build role scorecards

* Create onboarding checklists

* Build setter management system

* Implement KPI tracking

* Organize GHL views

* Establish weekly operating rhythm

* Create issue tracking

* Reduce founder daily involvement



---



TO APPLY



Send the following:



1. Summary of your operations experience

2. CRM tools you have used

3. Example of a system, SOP, or dashboard you built

4. 60-second voice recording introducing yourself

5. Explain how you would manage an appointment-setting team inside a CRM



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.



---



ABOUT US



Todd Dental Operations is a U.S.-based, family-owned business under the Todd Family Trust.



Founded by a retired United States Army Officer, the company is built on discipline, structure, and measurable execution.



We are building a long-term team and a real operating company.

title: Credit Repair Inquiry Removal Specialist (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
description:
Job Title: Credit Repair Inquiry Removal Specialist (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)

Overview:



We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist who specializes in hard inquiry removals across Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax.



This is NOT an entry-level role. You must have proven experience successfully removing inquiries using compliant and effective dispute strategies.



Responsibilities:

Analyze credit reports and identify removable hard inquiries

Execute dispute strategies via:

Online disputes

CFPB complaints

Direct bureau correspondence

Apply knowledge of permissible purpose and FCRA compliance

Track and manage dispute cycles until resolution

Document results and maintain client records in CRM

Communicate updates clearly with internal team or clients

Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

Proven experience removing hard inquiries from all 3 bureaus

Strong understanding of FCRA laws and dispute strategies

Experience using platforms like Credit Repair Cloud or similar CRM tools

Ability to explain your exact process/strategy during interview

Track record of successful deletions (be ready to show proof/results)

Strong English communication skills

Nice to Have:

Experience filing CFPB complaints

Knowledge of Metro 2 compliance

Background working with U.S.-based credit repair companies

Screening Questions (IMPORTANT):

Describe your exact process for removing hard inquiries

What methods do you use for Experian vs TransUnion vs Equifax?

What’s your average success rate?

What tools or software do you use?

Provide proof or examples of successful removals

Compensation:

Competitive pay (hourly or per deletion – to be discussed)

Performance-based incentives available





Why Join Us:

Consistent workflow and qualified clients

Long-term opportunity for top performers

Performance-driven environment

title: Experienced AutoCAD Drafter Needed – Glass & Metal Shop Drawings / Per Project

Scope of Work May Include:

Strong AutoCAD experience



Ability to read and understand architectural/construction drawings

Attention to detail and ability to follow drafting standards

Preferred Experience:



Glass and metal shop drawings



Commercial interior fit-out projects



NYC or U.S.-based construction projects

Work Arrangement:



Remote position



Per-project compensation

Flexible schedule, but deadlines must be met



To Apply:



Please send:



Your resume or work experience summary



Sample AutoCAD/shop drawing work



Your hourly rate or preferred per-project pricing



Your availability



A short description of your experience with glass, metal, or architectural drafting projects

title: B2B Cold Email & LinkedIn Outbound Copywriter
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



This is an opportunity to learn how leading organizations across the world are leveraging AI and flex your copywriting skills. This role will sharpen your ability to write for some of the most sophisticated buyers in the world. If you want to understand how enterprise companies think, make decisions, and respond to ideas, this is a front row seat.



We care about writing that moves people. Not templates. Not AI slop. Real, human communication that makes a senior executive stop scrolling and actually think. If that challenge excites you, this role is for you.



We are looking for a skilled outbound English copywriter fluent in American corporate culture &
ing norms to support the outbound sales efforts of a B2B SaaS company. Your job is to research accounts, research prospects, write highly personalized cold
s and LinkedIn messages, and organize them in Google Sheets & Google Docs following our delivery process. 



This is not a volume-first role: quality, personalization, and attention to detail are everything. We’re asking for 25-30 messages written a day. 



You will be writing multi-touch outbound sequences targeting senior technical and business stakeholders (CTO, VPs, Directors, Heads of Engineering, and similar personas) at companies with $3-40 Billion in annual revenue. 



ABOUT THE PRODUCT AND PROBLEM SPACE



You will be provided with full details about the product, the target personas, and the value proposition during the interview process. Prior to your first assignment you will be expected to understand what problems we solve for customers, why it matters to the buyers we target, core use cases, and be able to reflect that clearly in your writing without it sounding like you copied a website or used AI. 





WHAT YOU WILL DO



* Receive a list of target accounts and stakeholders via a shared Google Sheet including name, title, company, and LinkedIn URL

Research the account & assigned stakeholders using AI prompts to analyze their 10K, 10Qs, & Earnings Calls, then use that company research to personalize messages to individuals via LinkedIn and publicly available information to identify personalization hooks (recent posts, company news, role changes, initiatives, etc.)



* Write a full 7-touch outbound sequence per stakeholder consisting of:
 1 - LinkedIn Message 1 -
 2 - LinkedIn Message 2 -
 3 - LinkedIn Message 3 -
 4, delivered across an 8–10 week cadence



* Organize all
 copy inside a shared Google Doc, one document per account, structured by week and stakeholder so it can be copy/pasted directly without any reformatting



* Include proper formatting and hyperlinks in all
s so they are fully ready to send as-is



* Write LinkedIn messages in plain conversational text



* Maintain the Google Sheet tracker, marking each touch as complete when the message is written and ready

Ensure zero duplicate messaging — you will maintain a log of what has been written to prevent any stakeholder from receiving the same message twice, and to ensure each stakeholder receives a slightly different message. 



* Deliver daily touches M-F on a consistent schedule agreed upon at hire



WHAT YOU WILL ~NOT~ DO:



* You will not have access to any
 or LinkedIn accounts

* You will not send any messages yourself. Your responsibility is simply writing the copy.

* You will not select the contacts to target initially. 





ON USING AI TOOLS



You are permitted and encouraged to use Claude or similar AI tools to assist in drafting messages. However, the following rules are non-negotiable:



Every message must be reviewed and edited by you before submission — AI output is a starting point, not a final product

You will be provided with prompting guidelines that must be followed when generating copy with AI



After generating a message with AI, you are responsible for editing it to sound natural, human, and specific to the prospect

Certain messages in each sequence will need to be written entirely by hand without AI assistance. These will be clearly flagged. The ability to write compelling outbound copy without AI is a requirement of this role



Any message that reads as AI-generated, templated, or generic will not be accepted and will not qualify for the per-message bonus



Think of AI as your assistant, not your writer. You are the writer.





WHAT GREAT OUTPUT LOOKS LIKE



* Messages result in educating the prospect about novel ways to solve problems they face resulting in responses or inbound interest within 4-6 weeks of the campaign launch 



*
s are 75–125 words, punchy, and get to the point fast



* Every message references something specific and real about the company initiative they’re working on, and make a hypothesis about what problem the specific stakeholder may be facing — no generic openers



* Messages do not sound like AI. No phrases like “I hope this finds you well,” “I wanted to reach out,” “leverage,” “delve,” “synergies,” or anything that reads as templated



* Subject lines are short, punchy, create curiosity or cognitive dissonance, and do not sound like marketing



* The sequence tells a coherent story across all 7 touches — each message builds on the last & helps cover the top 5 use cases our customers have rather than repeating the same pitch



* LinkedIn messages are brief, human, and conversational — under 70 words



* Google Docs are cleanly organized so the responsible party can open, scroll to the current week, and copy/paste in under 60 seconds per message





REQUIREMENTS



* Proven experience writing B2B cold
 or outbound copy, ideally for a SaaS company



* Understanding of how software engineering teams leverage AI coding assistants in their workflows or willingness to learn. 



* Discernment - ability to identify how a reader feels, and if a message is well crafted. 



* A working understanding of software development, the software development lifecycle (SDLC), and the common pain points engineering and developer experience teams face — or a demonstrated ability to quickly learn and write credibly about technical subject matter



* Strong written English — native or near-native fluency required



* Understanding of American corporate communication norms & tone 



* Familiarity with outbound sales concepts: ICP, personas, pain points, value propositions, multi-touch sequences

Experience using Claude, ChatGPT, or similar AI tools to assist with writing — and the ability to edit AI output so it sounds like a real human wrote it



* Ability to research prospects on LinkedIn and extract meaningful personalization details



* Detail-oriented: you will be managing sequences for dozens of stakeholders simultaneously and cannot let touches fall out of order or get duplicated



* Reliable internet connection and availability during agreed-upon delivery windows



* Experience with Google Sheets and Google Docs



PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED



* Previous experience supporting outbound sales in a B2B SaaS environment



* Prior exposure to writing for technical buyers such as engineering managers, VPs of Engineering, or developer experience leaders





COMPENSATION



This is a performance-linked role with a hybrid pay structure:



* Base retainer: $
/month for a minimum of 125 messages a week, or 500 a month. 



* Per accepted message bonus: $0.25 per message used without edits



* Meeting bonus: $10–15 per meeting booked that originates from your sequence. ($10 for a manager, $15 for a Director or VP)



* Messages that require significant editing do not qualify for the per-message bonus. Quality is the standard, not volume. Top performers who consistently deliver clean, ready-to-send copy can expect to earn the full $500/month budget reliably.





HOW TO APPLY



Please do not send a generic application. 



To be considered, complete the following short task:



Write one cold
 and one LinkedIn message targeting a fictional VP of Engineering at a mid-size software company selling Claude, Cursor, Codex, or GitHub Copilot coding assistants.



The
 should be 75–125 words with a subject line. The LinkedIn message should be under 75 words. 



Paste both directly into your application message.



Applications without this task completed will not be reviewed.

title: TikTok Assistant (Fashion)

WORK DETAILS:

title: olar Appointment Setter -  Remote / Full Time - US Hours
description:
About the Role



We are Surge Marketing, a fast-growing US-based solar appointment setting company. We book qualified solar consultations for homeowners across multiple US states using a professional power dialer and CRM system.



We are hiring 10 outbound appointment setters to join our team immediately. This is a full-time remote role with real growth potential. Top performers earn bonuses (up to $500/month) and receive monthly pay raises as we scale.



What You Will Do



* Make outbound calls to US homeowners using our power dialer (Kixie)

* Follow our proven call script to qualify leads and book solar consultations

* Qualify homeowners based on three criteria: homeownership, credit score, and roof suitability

* Submit a daily report at the end of every shift

* Communicate with the team via Slack



What We Offer



* Paid 2-day trial to get familiar with the system before committing full time

* Full-time contract after the trial, guaranteed hours

* Starting pay: $4hour

* Monthly pay raises based on performance, we reward consistency ($10/hour by month 3)

* Bonuses for top performers, setters who hit and exceed targets earn extra every month 

* Weekly pay via Wise or PayPal, every Friday without exception

* Full training provided, call script, CRM walkthrough, dialer setup

* Long-term opportunity, we are scaling fast and promote from within





Schedule



US hours: 9am to 5pm Eastern Standard Time

Monday to Saturday

This is approximately 10pm to 6am Philippine time

Must be comfortable working night shift



Requirements



* Clear spoken English: you will be speaking with US homeowners daily

* Stable internet connection, minimum 25 Mbps

* Quiet workspace and working headset

* Previous outbound calling or BPO experience preferred

* Available to start immediately



How to Apply



Send your application with the following:



A 30-second voice recording introducing yourself using this exact line: "Hi, I'm calling because a lot of homeowners in your area are saving around 30% on their electric bill, did I catch you at a bad time?"



Your most recent outbound calling experience, what did you sell or set, and what was your daily dial target?



Your internet speed, please run a test at speedtest.net and include the result



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
About Us:

Arro AI Solutions is a US-based marketing agency that helps roofing companies grow their business through paid advertising and AI-driven lead capture. We're scaling our outbound team and need a dedicated cold caller who knows how to handle US business owners.

About the Role:

Your primary job is cold calling US-based roofing companies from a list we provide. You'll pitch our services, qualify the owner, handle objections, and book interested prospects onto our calendar for a strategy call.

You'll also handle warm leads that come in from
 outreach replies and form fills (about 20-30% of your time). Different motion — these prospects already showed interest, so you're confirming details and booking the call quickly.



Compensation (Performance-Based, No Cap):



$100 USD per pilot deal closed — paid the day the client signs.

$50 USD/month recurring — for every client that stays on retainer, you keep earning while they pay.

Following first 5-10 clients- base pay and pay per appointment shown.



Realistic earnings:



Month 1: $700-1,000

Month 6: $1,200-1,500/mo (recurring revenue compounds)

Top performers earn more



Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal.

Hours:

20-25 hours/week. Must work US business hours (9 AM - 6 PM Eastern). Set your own schedule within those windows.

Requirements:



2+ years experience cold calling US-based businesses (B2B preferred)

Neutral English accent — must sound natural and confident to American business owners

Reliable internet (25 Mbps+), quality headset, quiet workspace

Comfortable with rejection (cold calling is the job, not warm leads alone)

Self-motivated and KPI-driven

Familiar with CRM systems (we use GoHighLevel — we'll train you)



To Apply (incomplete applications will be ignored):



Send your resume with US-market cold calling experience clearly listed

Record a 60-90 second voice sample — pretend you're cold calling a roofing company owner. Pitch them anything. We're listening for clarity, confidence, and tone. Upload to Google Drive, Dropbox, or Vocaroo and include the link.

Answer these 4 questions in your application:

a. How many cold dials per day did you average in your last role?

b. What's your booking rate (booked calls per 100 dials)?

c. Describe the hardest objection you've handled and how you got past it.

d. Why does performance-based compensation work for you?

Confirm your full availability in EST (which hours, which days)



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

Trial: 14 days. Strong performers get expanded responsibility and higher commission tiers added at month 2.

Start: ASAP. Looking to fill within 5 days.

title: SEO & Website Growth Specialist

other perks

title: Property Management VA (Remote)
description:
- TO APPLY : PLEASE SEE BELOW -

**No Video, No response.**



- Question #4 is the most important and should be the longest answer! :) Thank you!



______________________________________________



What You'll Do:

1. Focus on guest communication and coordination across multiple booking platforms.

2. Manage technical issues, facilitate review removals, and provide general support for property listings.

3. Log and manage daily issues and tasks efficiently within our task management system.

4. Continuously identify opportunities to enhance processes and elevate guest satisfaction.



Qualifications:

+ High integrity and a strong sense of accountability.

+ Friendly, professional communication skills when interacting with guests and teammates.

+ Teachable and eager to follow established workflows and procedures.

+ Competence and confidence in completing tasks independently.

+ A genuine passion for guest service and a commitment to creating positive experiences.



Requirements:

* Excellent written & verbal English.

* Access to a physical computer (not mobile-only).

* A reliable backup plan for power or internet interruptions (e.g., secondary connection or device).

* Experience with Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Breezeway, etc. (preferred)



Tools You'll Use:

- Guesty, Breezeway, Airbnb, VRBO, 
, and related booking platforms.

- Gqueues and our internal Issue Log for task management and communication. (Easy Learn)

- Hubstaff for time tracking and accountability.

(The goal of Hubstaff is not to micromanage, but as a tool to foster trust and transparency. It helps us recognize hard work, and strengthen team accountability, allowing us to reward consistent effort.)



AI Policy: AI tools are encouraged to assist with writing, organization, or research tasks. However, we prefer that it NOT be used for direct communication with guests or internal tea
mbers. We are committed to genuine human connection, ensuring all interactions feel authentic and organic. We are not looking for PERFECT, we are looking for Human. :)



Compensation & Growth:

Pay increases are performance- and trust-based; consistent reliability, clear communication, and high-quality work are always rewarded. We believe in taking care of people who take care of the work.



______________________________________________



How to Apply:

title: Appointment Setter & Lead Manager
description:
Main Job

Call new leads as fast as possible, book them, and collect all booking details including payment info.

Speed matters most—call within 5 minutes of a new lead notification.



FOR YOU TO APPLY FOR THIS JOB YOU MUST SEND A VOICE RECORDING OF THE SCRIPT BELOW. IT DOES NOT HAVE TO BE PERFECT. I WILL NOT REPLY TO ANYONE IF YOU DO NOT REPLY TO THIS POST WITH A VOICE RECORDING OF THE SCRIPT.



Daily Tasks

Check Gmail + HighLevel for new leads

Call immediately when a lead comes in

Follow the script

Book appointments into calendar

Collect:

Full name

Address

Service they want

Card on file (required to book)



Pay

$2 per hour

$3 for every booked job



You are allowed to work on other tasks during your shift, but whenever a new lead comes in, you must call it within 5 minutes.





???? INBOUND CALL SCRIPT

1. Opening

“Hey, this is (name) with Revive Detail BR, how can I help you?”



2. Find the Problem

“Got you—what’s the main reason you’re looking to get it detailed right now?”



3. Lean Into the Problem

“Yeah, you definitely called the right people. We deal with that all the time—whether it’s pet hair, kids making a mess, spills, all of it.”



4. Qualify Them

“Have you ever had your car professionally detailed before?”



5. Explain the Service

“Got it. So how we work is we’re fully mobile—we come straight to you. And this is more of a deep clean, not just a basic wash.”

“On the interior we do a full deep vacuum, blow out all the tight areas, steam clean, and disinfect all surfaces—basically giving the interior a full reset.”

“On the exterior we degrease the wheels and tires, remove bugs, do a pre-wash, foam bath with a hand wash, towel dry, clean door jambs, and finish with tire shine.”



6. Confirm Interest

“So based on what you were telling me, is that pretty much what you had in mind?”



7. Paint the Result

“Perfect. When we’re done, it’s going to look and feel like a completely different car—honestly most people say it feels brand new again.”



8. Price + Add-Ons

“As you probably saw, our full detail is $180.”

“Now depending on what you mentioned, we also offer a few add-ons if needed:

 • Seat shampooing – $50

 • Pet hair removal – $45

 • Engine bay cleaning – $50

 • Stain removal – $40 (if this is what they pick, say you will only charge for it if you get the stain out)

If your car has (their issue), I’d definitely recommend adding that so we can get the best result possible.”



9. Introduce Membership

“Now most people don’t just do this once, because the car gets dirty again.”



10. Explain Why

“So what a lot of our clients do is go on a maintenance plan after the first detail.”

“We offer monthly, bi-monthly, or quarterly—and we discount it since we already did that first deep clean.”

“Monthly is $60 off, bi-monthly is $45 off, and quarterly is $30 off.”



11. Personalize

“And especially with (kids/dogs/work), it’s going to get dirty again anyway—so instead of starting over every time, we just keep it clean for you and it saves you money.”



12. Close the Plan

“For your situation, does monthly or quarterly sound better for you?”



13. If No ? Pivot

“No worries at all—that’s totally fine. Let’s just get you taken care of with a one-time detail.”

“What’s a good day or time for you this week?”



14. Book Appointment

“Perfect, I’ve got you down for [day/time]. Can I get your full name and the best address for the service?”



15. Card on File + Policy

“Perfect, I just need to get a card on file to lock in your appointment. We are NOT charging anything today—this just secures your spot.”

After the card is on file say this disclaimer:

 “We’ll send you reminders, and if you need to cancel just let us know at least 24 hours before. If not, there is a $100 late cancellation fee.”



16. Close / Confirmation

“Awesome, thank you for booking with Revive Detail BR! You can call or text the number that sent you the confirmation message if you need anything at all.”

title: AI Automation Manager
description:
About Green Energy Mechanical



Green Energy Mechanical is a residential HVAC, plumbing, and electrical company serving the Greater Boston market. We have been in business for over 15 years and are building a high-performance company focused on premium service, strong growth, and operational excellence.



We are looking for someone to help us build the future operating system of our business.



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is not a generic chatbot role. This is a systems-building role inside a real operating business.



You will work directly with leadership to streamline workflows, remove bottlenecks, reduce office overhead, improve speed and accountability, and help lay the groundwork for a future SaaS platform for the trades.



Why this role is exciting



You will help optimize a successful home service company from the inside while helping shape systems that may later become software sold to other contractors.



That means your work will have real-world impact immediately:



faster workflows

less wasted time

fewer bottlenecks

better follow-up

stronger reporting

more scalable operations



If you love turning messy operations into clean systems, this is a rare chance to build something meaningful.



What success looks like



In this role, you will help us:



automate repetitive workflows across departments

reduce owner and manager interruptions

streamline sold-job handoffs, purchasing, warehouse coordination, and install prep

improve call center consistency and booking performance

build dashboards and action systems that show what is happening and what to do next

support the internal buildout of AI-powered operational tools that may eventually become a SaaS product for the trades

Responsibilities

Build and maintain automations across ServiceTitan, Slack, Chiirp, Google Workspace, and related tools

Create workflows for sold jobs, ordering, install preparation, follow-up, internal alerts, and customer communications

Help develop internal AI tools that give office staff, field teams, and managers instant answers

Support call center improvement through AI-assisted review, scoring, and workflow enforcement

Build dashboards and action logic tied to KPIs

Improve warehouse and routing workflows so jobs move faster with fewer errors

Document systems in a clear, repeatable way

Identify pain points, propose solutions, and ship improvements quickly

Required skills and software experience

Strong written and spoken English

Strong experience with Make, Zapier, or n8n

Experience with APIs, webhooks, and systems integration

Experience using Slack workflows

Strong working knowledge of Google Sheets and/or Airtable

Comfortable using AI tools such as OpenAI and Claude

Strong process thinking and operational problem solving

Ability to document workflows clearly

Able to overlap with U.S. Eastern Time for meetings and collaboration

Preferred

Experience with ServiceTitan

Experience with Chiirp

Experience with Retool or other dashboard / internal tool platforms

Basic Python skills

Experience with home service operations, customer service, or sales teams

Product mindset, not just task execution

Who will thrive here



You take ownership.

You move quickly.

You like solving real operational problems.

You can communicate clearly with non-technical people.

You want to build systems that actually get used.



We are building a championship-level company. We are looking for someone who wants to help build it.



To apply



Please send:



A short introduction

Examples of automations or systems you have built

The tools you are strongest in

Any experience with ServiceTitan, home services, or operations

Why this role interests you

title: Freight Forwarding Operations Specialist | CargoWise
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



At DG Air, we’ve specialised in dangerous goods logistics for over 25 years. From transporting hazardous materials across Australia to exporting critical radiopharmaceuticals to New Zealand, we support industries that keep essential global supply chains moving. With strict safety standards, advanced systems, and a strong culture of accountability, our mission is to minimise risk, protect communities, and preserve the environment for future generations.

We are currently seeking experienced Freight Forwarders / Cargo Transport Operators to join our operations support team remotely from the Philippines.



What’s in it for you



• 100% Work From Home (no daily commute)

• Stable long-term employment with an Australian company

• Lower travel costs and better work-life balance

• Real exposure to international freight operations

• Ongoing training and development within a specialist logistics environment



Key Responsibilities



• Managing import and export shipments across air and sea freight from end-to-end, including complete management of shipments

• Preparing and generating all required shipping documentation, such as bookings, bills of lading, airway bills, commercial documents, and regulatory paperwork—not just reviewing or checking

• Coordinating domestic transport movements, including DG shipments via road and air

• Liaising with airlines, shipping lines, transport providers, overseas agents, and internal teams to ensure timely execution of shipments

• Working closely with our Australian-based operations team

• Maintaining accurate and timely data entry in CargoWise

• Tracking shipments and proactively resolving operational issues

• Ensuring compliance with regulatory, documentation, and operational standards





Requirements (Must Have)



• Experience working in a freight forwarding company

• Strong, hands-on experience with CargoWise (essential)

• Proven experience managing shipments end-to-end, including documentation creation (not limited to tracking or coordination)

• Solid understanding of end-to-end freight process, including:

quoting, booking, documentation, customs coordination, and delivery

• Strong attention to detail and accuracy in system work

• Good communication skills and ability to work with international teams

• Reliable, disciplined, and proactive work ethic





Who We’re Looking For



We’re looking for someone who already understands the realities of freight forwarding and is ready for a more stable, remote setup without stepping away from the industry.

If you enjoy structured operations work, take pride in accuracy, and want a long-term role where your experience truly matters, this could be a great fit

title: Outbound Cold Caller — US Market
description:
What This Job Is:

This is a high-volume outbound cold calling role. You will make 80–100 calls per day to US business owners, follow a provided script, and book 20-minute appointments for our founder. That is the entire job.

If you are comfortable on the phone, handle rejection without losing energy, and are motivated by earning more when you perform better — keep reading.

If you are looking for customer service, lead research, or a relaxed work-from-home job — this is not the right fit.



About Us:

We build workflow automation for service businesses in the US. Business owners love it because they stop losing jobs to voi
. We are growing fast and need callers who can get US business owners on the phone and excited about a quick demo.



Your Daily Responsibilities

• Make 80–100 outbound calls per day to US business owners using our provided lead list

• Follow the script, qualify the prospect, and book a 20-minute call with our founder

• Handle objections professionally and stay persistent without being pushy

• Log every call outcome accurately in a shared Google Sheet

• Attend a short daily check-in and flag anything that needs attention



What You Will NOT Do

• Close deals yourself — your only job is to book the appointment

• Research leads — we provide the full contact list

• Do admin, customer service, or account management



What You Earn

Base salary plus performance bonuses. The more you book, the more you earn.



• Base: $300–$400 USD/month depending on experience

• $10 USD for every discovery call that shows up

• $20 USD for every deal that closes after your booked call

• $30 USD bonus if you personally close the deal yourself



What earnings look like in practice:

• Solid month — 20 showed calls + 6 closes + base: ~$670 USD

• Strong month — 40 showed calls + 12 closes + base: ~$1,040 USD

• Top month — 60 showed calls + 18 closes + base: ~$1,360 USD



Payments are bi-weekly via Wise. Base is guaranteed. Bonuses are paid when conditions are met.



What We Are Looking For

• Clear, professional spoken English easily understood by US business owners

• Real outbound cold calling experience — B2B preferred

• Ability to make 80+ calls per day and stay sharp throughout

• Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Available during US business hours (Eastern or Central time)

• Honest with call logging — we verify using recorded calls



Tools We Provide

• Full lead list with verified US business owner contact details

• JustCall account with a US phone number — all calls made and recorded through this system

• Call script and objection handling guide

• Google Sheet for daily logging



How to Apply

Your application must include two things. Missing either one means your application will not be reviewed.



1. A 30-second voice introduction

Record yourself saying your name, where you are from, how many years of cold calling experience you have, and one sentence about why you are good on the phone. Upload to Google Drive or Dropbox and share the link.



2. One sentence answering this question

What is the most calls you have made in a single day, and what were you selling?



* Applications without a voice recording will not be considered regardless of experience. This is non-negotiable — your voice is your tool and we need to hear it before we can move forward.



Shortlisted candidates will be sent a second script to record as a final step before an interview.



A Note from the Founder

I run a lean operation and work directly with everyone on the team. If you book good calls and help close deals, I will know your name and you will earn accordingly. There is no cap on what you can make — the more you produce, the more you earn, and the top performers will have first access to better opportunities as we grow.



If that sounds like your kind of environment, I want to hear from you.



- Matt -
